final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an AWS SQS standard queue with basic configuration including visibility timeout, message retention, and tags.'

Resources:
  SqsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for SQS queue encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sqs.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'

  Queue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-queue'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 0
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-queue'

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'The URL of the created SQS queue.'
    Value: !Ref Queue
  QueueArn:
    Description: 'The ARN of the created SQS queue.'
    Value: !GetAtt Queue.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SNS Topic with Email Subscription for test@test.com notifications'

Resources:
  SnsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'Customer managed KMS key for SNS topic encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS service to use the key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EmailNotifications

  NotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: Test Notifications
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SnsEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EmailNotifications

  EmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: test@test.com
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref NotificationTopic

Outputs:
  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS Topic for notifications
    Value: !Ref NotificationTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NotificationTopic'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a default secure S3 bucket with SSE-KMS encryption at rest (customer-managed key), versioning enabled, all public access blocked, HTTPS-only access enforced via bucket policy, tagged for organization, and DeletionPolicy set to Retain.'

Resources:
  DefaultKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowS3Encryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
              StringLike:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-default-bucket/*'

  DefaultBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-default-bucket'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref DefaultKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: default

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref DefaultBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${DefaultBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${DefaultBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref DefaultBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt DefaultBucket.Arn
  BucketDomainName:
    Description: 'Domain name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt DefaultBucket.DomainName
  DefaultKmsKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of KMS key for bucket encryption'
    Value: !GetAtt DefaultKmsKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Amazon S3 bucket configured for static website hosting with DeletionPolicy: Retain to prevent accidental deletion.'

Resources:
  WebsiteKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for S3 website bucket encryption"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"

  WebsiteBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-website-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      WebsiteConfiguration:
        IndexDocument: index.html
        ErrorDocument: error.html
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt WebsiteKMSKey.Arn
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: StaticWebsite

  WebsiteBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref WebsiteBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:GetObject"
            Resource: !Sub "${WebsiteBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": "true"

Outputs:
  WebsiteURL:
    Description: "The URL of the static website hosted on S3"
    Value: !GetAtt WebsiteBucket.WebsiteURL
  WebsiteEndpoint:
    Description: "The endpoint URL for the S3 website"
    Value: !GetAtt WebsiteBucket.RegionalDomainName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instance with latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI in a basic VPC setup

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: 't3.micro'
  KeyName:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName'
  AllowedSSHcidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
  MyInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
  MyGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref MyInternetGateway
  MyPublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
  MyPublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RouteTable'
  MyPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: MyGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref MyPublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref MyInternetGateway
  MyRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref MyPublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref MyPublicRouteTable
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance allowing SSH
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedSSHcidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: '10.0.0.0/16'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroup'
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      SubnetId: !Ref MyPublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: '/dev/xvda'
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: 'enabled'
        HttpTokens: 'required'
        HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        InstanceMetadataTags: 'disabled'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP of the EC2 Instance
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PublicIp
  PublicDnsName:
    Description: Public DNS Name of the EC2 Instance
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PublicDnsName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a DynamoDB table for ArtistId, Concert, and TicketSales data with a Global Secondary Index (GSI) for efficient querying by concert and artist, Point-in-Time Recovery, TTL, SSE, and production-ready configurations.'

Parameters:
  TableNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional prefix for the table name (e.g., env-).'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-]*$'
    MaxLength: 20

Resources:
  ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable:
    Type: 'AWS::DynamoDB::Table'
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${TableNamePrefix}${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: 'ArtistId'
          AttributeType: 'S'
        - AttributeName: 'Concert'
          AttributeType: 'S'
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: 'ArtistId'
          KeyType: 'HASH'
        - AttributeName: 'Concert'
          KeyType: 'RANGE'
      BillingMode: 'PAY_PER_REQUEST'
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: 'KMS'
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: 'expirationDate'
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: 'TicketSalesIndex'
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: 'Concert'
              KeyType: 'HASH'
            - AttributeName: 'ArtistId'
              KeyType: 'RANGE'
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: 'ALL'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: 'Name of the DynamoDB table.'
    Value: !Ref 'ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TableName'
  TableArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB table.'
    Value: !GetAtt 'ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable.Arn'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TableArn'
  TicketSalesIndexArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the TicketSalesIndex GSI.'
    Value: !Sub '${ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable}/index/TicketSalesIndex'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TicketSalesIndexArn'

    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance allowing SSH inbound and all outbound.
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSecurityGroup'

  MyLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
          HttpProtocolIpv6: disabled
          InstanceMetadataTags: disabled
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeType: gp3
              VolumeSize: 8
              Encrypted: true
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: '0'
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum update -y
      LaunchTemplateTagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LaunchTemplate'

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateSpecification:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref MyLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt MyLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance'
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: The ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  EC2PublicIp:
    Description: The public IP address of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  InstanceSecurityGroupId:
    Description: The ID of the instance security group
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup

Description: 'CloudFormation template for a basic t3.micro EC2 instance with secure remote management via AWS Systems Manager (SSM). Uses region-specific SSM-enabled Amazon Linux 2 AMIs, VPC, public subnet, minimal security group, and IAM role.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Minimal security group for SSM access - outbound HTTPS to SSM endpoints only
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          Description: SSM
          DestinationPrefixListId: !FindInMap [SSMPrefixListMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', SSM]
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          Description: SSM Messages
          DestinationPrefixListId: !FindInMap [SSMPrefixListMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', SSMMessages]
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          Description: EC2 Messages
          DestinationPrefixListId: !FindInMap [SSMPrefixListMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', EC2Messages]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG'

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'SSMRole-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'SSMRole-${AWS::StackName}'

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [AmazonLinux2SSMAMIMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', SSM]
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      EbsOptimized: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: "required"
        HttpEndpoint: "enabled"
        HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        InstanceMetadataTags: "disabled"
        HttpProtocolIpv6: "disabled"
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp2
            DeleteOnTermination: false
            VolumeSize: 8
            Encrypted: true
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Instance'
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -x
          yum update -y
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl status amazon-ssm-agent
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance --region ${AWS::Region}
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: The ID of the EC2 instance for SSM Session Manager connectivity
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP address of the EC2 instance (SSM does not require inbound access)
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  PublicDNSName:
    Description: Public DNS name of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicDnsName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a DynamoDB table for mobile notifications reporting with pay-per-request billing, TTL auto-expiry, and a global secondary index on type and sentTime for time-based queries.'

Resources:
  MobileNotificationsTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MobileNotificationsTable-${AWS::Region}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: sentTime
          AttributeType: N
        - AttributeName: type
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: sentTime
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: ttl
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: TypeSentTimeIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: type
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: sentTime
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MobileNotificationsReporting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  TableArn:
    Description: ARN of the MobileNotificationsTable

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'provisions an EC2 instance with EIP and SSH access in the default VPC.'

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: 'VPC ID (provide default VPC ID for deployment)'
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    NoEcho: true
    Description: 'An existing EC2 Key Pair for SSH access'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t2.micro
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
    Description: 'EC2 instance type'
  SSHInboundCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/8
    Description: 'CIDR for SSH access (recommend using specific IP for production)'

Resources:
  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHInboundCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Join
            - '-'
            - - MyEC2Stack
              - !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
  MyLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !Ref KeyName
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref MySecurityGroup
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: '/dev/xvda'
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Join
            - '-'
            - - MyLaunchTemplate
              - !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref MyLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt MyLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Join
            - '-'
            - - MyEC2Stack
              - !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
  MyEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Join
            - '-'
            - - MyEC2Stack
              - !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
  MyEIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref MyEC2Instance
      AllocationId: !Ref MyEIP

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: Elastic IP Address
    Value: !Ref MyEIP
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref MySecurityGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Provisions an unattached ENI with dual EIPs for multi-IP EC2 handling. Attach the ENI to an EC2 instance to enable multiple public IPs via one interface.'

Parameters:
  SubnetCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the public subnet
  PrimaryPrivateIp:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.10
    Description: Primary private IP address for the ENI
  SecondaryPrivateIp:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.11
    Description: Secondary private IP address for the ENI
  AllowedSshCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/8
    Description: CIDR block allowed for SSH inbound access

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for multi-IP ENI: HTTP/HTTPS/SSH inbound, all outbound'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedSshCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SG'

  ENI:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkInterface
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      PrivateIpAddresses:
        - PrivateIpAddress: !Ref PrimaryPrivateIp
          Primary: true
        - PrivateIpAddress: !Ref SecondaryPrivateIp
          Primary: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ENI'

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP1'

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP2'

  EIPAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: !Ref PrimaryPrivateIp

  EIPAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: !Ref SecondaryPrivateIp

Outputs:
  ENI:
    Description: 'ENI ID. Attach to an EC2 instance (e.g., via CloudFormation NetworkInterfaceAttachment resource with DeviceIndex: 1, or AWS console/EC2 API) to enable multi-public IP support. After attaching ENI to EC2 (DeviceIndex: 1), associate SecurityGroup (!Ref SecurityGroup) via AWS Console (Network Interfaces > Actions > Security > Change security groups), CLI (modify-network-interface-attribute), or additional CFN template.'
    Value: !Ref ENI
  PrimaryPrivateIP:
    Description: Primary private IP on the ENI (associated with PrimaryPublicIP)
    Value: !Ref PrimaryPrivateIp
  SecondaryPrivateIP:
    Description: Secondary private IP on the ENI (associated with SecondaryPublicIP)
    Value: !Ref SecondaryPrivateIp
  PrimaryPublicIP:
    Description: Public IP associated with the primary private IP
    Value: !GetAtt EIP1.PublicIp
  SecondaryPublicIP:
    Description: Public IP associated with the secondary private IP
    Value: !GetAtt EIP2.PublicIp

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'API Gateway REST API with Lambda non-proxy integration'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  HelloWorldFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: nodejs24.x
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify({ message: 'Hello from Lambda!' })
            };
          };
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref HelloWorldFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${MyRestApi}/*/hello/GET'

  MyRestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MyRestApi
      Description: Simple REST API with Lambda non-proxy integration
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - application/json

  HelloResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt MyRestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: hello

  HelloWorldMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref HelloResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${HelloWorldFunction.Arn}/invocations
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        Credentials: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($context.responseOverride.status = $input.path('$.statusCode').toNumber())
                $input.path('$.body')

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      Description: Initial deployment
    DependsOn: HelloWorldMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      StageName: prod
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      MethodSettings:
        - ResourcePath: '/*/*'
          LoggingLevel: 'INFO'
          DataTraceEnabled: true
          MetricsEnabled: true

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: API Gateway endpoint URL
    Value: !Sub ${MyRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/hello

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys Glue Database and Crawler for CloudTrail S3 logs, enabling Athena structured queries with cloudtrail_ prefixed tables

Parameters:
  DatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: cloudtrail_db
    Description: Name of the Glue database
  CrawlerName:
    Type: String
    Default: cloudtrail_crawler
    Description: Name of the Glue crawler
  S3Path:
    Type: String
    Default: s3://kk-admin/cloud-trail/AWSLogs/
    Description: S3 path containing CloudTrail logs
  CrawlerSchedule:
    Type: String
    Default: none
    Description: Cron expression for the crawler schedule (e.g., cron(0 12 * * ? *)), or 'none' for on-demand

Conditions:
  UseSchedule: !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Ref CrawlerSchedule
      - none

Resources:
  GlueCloudTrailCrawlerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns: ["arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole"]
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudTrailS3AccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: arn:aws:s3:::kk-admin
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                Resource: arn:aws:s3:::kk-admin/cloud-trail/AWSLogs/*
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CloudTrailGlueCatalog
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  CloudTrailDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref DatabaseName
        Description: Database for CloudTrail logs cataloged by Glue Crawler for Athena querying
  CloudTrailCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref CrawlerName
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCloudTrailCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Ref S3Path
      TablePrefix: cloudtrail_
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: UPDATE_IN_DATABASE
        DeleteBehavior: DEPRECATE_IN_DATABASE
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: CRAWL_EVENT_MODE
      Configuration: |
        {
          "Version": 1.0,
          "CrawlerOutput": {
            "Partitions": { "AddOrUpdateBehavior": "InheritFromTable" },
            "Tables": { "AddOrUpdateBehavior": "MergeNewColumns" }
          },
          "Grouping": { "TableGroupingPolicy": "CombineCompatibleSchemas" }
        }
      Schedule:
        Fn::If:
          - UseSchedule
          - ScheduleExpression: !Ref CrawlerSchedule
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      Tags:
        Project: CloudTrailGlueCatalog
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  DatabaseName:
    Description: Glue Database for Athena queries
    Value: !Ref DatabaseName
  CrawlerName:
    Description: Crawler name for manual runs
    Value: !Ref CrawlerName
  CrawlerRef:
    Description: Crawler reference for manual runs
    Value: !Ref CloudTrailCrawler
  CrawlerRoleArn:
    Description: IAM Role ARN used by the crawler
    Value: !GetAtt GlueCloudTrailCrawlerRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys multi-threshold CloudWatch billing alarms with SNS email notifications evaluated every 6 hours.

Parameters:
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Default: xxxxx@gmail.com
    Description: Email address for billing alerts.

Resources:
  BillingAlertsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for SNS billing alerts encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "Allow root access",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
              },
              "Action": "kms:*",
              "Resource": "*"
            },
            {
              "Sid": "Allow SNS service",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "Service": "sns.amazonaws.com"
              },
              "Action": [
                "kms:GenerateDataKey",
                "kms:Decrypt"
              ],
              "Resource": "*",
              "Condition": {
                "StringEquals": {
                  "kms:ViaService": "sns.*.amazonaws.com"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  BillingAlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: AWS Billing Threshold Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref BillingAlertsKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  BillingAlertsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress

  BillingAlarm5USD:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: BillingAlarm5USD
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when estimated monthly charges exceed 5 USD"
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: USD
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: 5
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  BillingAlarm10USD:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: BillingAlarm10USD
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when estimated monthly charges exceed 10 USD"
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: USD
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: 10
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  BillingAlarm20USD:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: BillingAlarm20USD
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when estimated monthly charges exceed 20 USD"
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: USD
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: 20
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  BillingAlarm40USD:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: BillingAlarm40USD
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when estimated monthly charges exceed 40 USD"
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: USD
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: 40
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  BillingAlertsTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for billing alerts
    Value: !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
  BillingAlertsSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS email subscription for billing alerts
    Value: !Ref BillingAlertsSubscription
  BillingAlarm5USDName:
    Description: Name of the BillingAlarm5USD CloudWatch alarm
    Value: !Ref BillingAlarm5USD
  BillingAlarm5USDArn:
    Description: ARN of the BillingAlarm5USD CloudWatch alarm
    Value: !GetAtt BillingAlarm5USD.Arn

    Description: Name of the BillingAlarm10USD CloudWatch alarm

  BillingAlarm10USDArn:

  BillingAlarm20USDName:
    Description: Name of the BillingAlarm20USD CloudWatch alarm
    Value: !Ref BillingAlarm20USD
  BillingAlarm20USDArn:
    Description: ARN of the BillingAlarm20USD CloudWatch alarm
    Value: !GetAtt BillingAlarm20USD.Arn

    Value: !Ref BillingAlarm40USD

    Description: ARN of the BillingAlarm40USD CloudWatch alarm
    Value: !GetAtt BillingAlarm40USD.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for DynamoDB Streams to EventBridge Pipe integration'

Parameters:
  ResourceNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Prefix for resource names (e.g., env or project)'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-]*$'
    MaxLength: 20

Resources:
  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${ResourceNamePrefix}UserDataTable-${AWS::StackName}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: userId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: userId
          KeyType: HASH
      BillingMode: PROVISIONED
      ProvisionedThroughput:
        ReadCapacityUnits: 5
        WriteCapacityUnits: 5
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      StreamSpecification:
        StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES

  UserEventsBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${ResourceNamePrefix}UserEventsBus-${AWS::StackName}'

  EventBridgePipeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${ResourceNamePrefix}EventBridgePipeRole-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBStreamEventBridgePipePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                  - dynamodb:DescribeTable
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.Arn
                  - !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.StreamArn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - events:PutEvents
                  - events:PutRule
                  - events:DescribeRule
                Resource: !GetAtt UserEventsBus.Arn

  DynamoDBToEventBridgePipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${ResourceNamePrefix}DynamoDBToEventBridgePipe-${AWS::StackName}'
      RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgePipeRole.Arn
      Source: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.StreamArn
      Target: !GetAtt UserEventsBus.Arn
      SourceParameters:
        DynamoDBStreamParameters:
          BatchSize: 5
          MaximumBatchingWindowInSeconds: 5
          StartingPosition: LATEST
        FilterCriteria:
          Filters:
            - Pattern: |
                {
                  "dynamodb": [
                    {
                      "NewImage": [
                        {
                          "avatarUrl": [
                            {
                              "ends_with": [".png"]
                            }
                          ]
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  ]
                }
      TargetParameters:
        EventBridgeEventBusParameters:
          Source: "UserService"
          DetailType: "AvatarUpdated"
        InputTemplate: |
          {
            "DetailType": "AvatarUpdated",
            "Source": "UserService",
            "detail": "<aws.pipes.entire-event>"
          }

Outputs:
  DynamoDBTableName:
    Description: 'Name of the DynamoDB Table'
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBTable
  DynamoDBStreamArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB Stream'
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.StreamArn
  UserEventsBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus'
    Value: !GetAtt UserEventsBus.Arn
  PipeName:
    Description: 'Name of the EventBridge Pipe'
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBToEventBridgePipe
  PipeArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Pipe'
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBToEventBridgePipe.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge configuration to route custom events to an external API endpoint via HTTPS webhook.'

Parameters:
  ApiKey:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: 'dummy-api-key'
    Description: 'API Key value for authenticating requests to the webhook endpoint.'

Resources:
  CustomEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: CustomEventBus

  WebhookConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      Name: WebhookConnection
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: X-API-Key
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ApiKey

  WebhookApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt WebhookConnection.Arn
      Name: WebhookApiDestination
      InvocationEndpoint: https://webhook.site/testtest
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  EventBridgeApiDestinationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InvokeApiDestinationPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:InvokeApiDestination
                Resource: !GetAtt WebhookApiDestination.Arn

  CustomEventRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref CustomEventBus
      Name: CustomEventRule
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - custom.application
      Targets:
        - Id: WebhookTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt WebhookApiDestination.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeApiDestinationRole.Arn
          InputPath: '$'

Outputs:
  CustomEventBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus.'
    Value: !GetAtt CustomEventBus.Arn
  WebhookConnectionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Connection for webhook authentication.'
    Value: !GetAtt WebhookConnection.Arn
  WebhookApiDestinationArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge API Destination for the webhook endpoint.'
    Value: !GetAtt WebhookApiDestination.Arn
  CustomEventRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Rule routing events to the webhook.'
    Value: !Ref CustomEventRule

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudWatch Dashboard and Logs Insights queries for AWS Client VPN monitoring across auth methods and endpoints.'

Parameters:
  ClientVPNAuthLogGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: '/aws/vpn/client-vpn-auth'
    Description: 'CloudWatch Logs log group containing Client VPN connection and authentication logs (e.g., /aws/vpn/client-vpn-auth)'
  DashboardName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'ClientVPN-Monitoring-Dashboard'
    Description: 'Name of the CloudWatch Dashboard'
  TimeRange:
    Type: String
    Default: 'P7D'
    Description: 'ISO8601 duration for dashboard widgets time range (e.g., P7D for last 7 days)'

Resources:
  ClientVPNConnectionDurations:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: 'ClientVPN/ConnectionDurations'
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNAuthLogGroupName
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, @message
        | parse @message '*"' as event
        | filter event.eventType in ["connection-log"]
        | fields startTime = toLong(event.connectionStartTime), endTime = toLong(event.connectionEndTime)
        | fields duration = (endTime - startTime) / 1000
        | stats avg(duration) as avgDuration by bin(1h), event.endpointId, event.username
        | sort @timestamp desc

  ClientVPNDataTransferIngress:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: 'ClientVPN/DataTransferIngress'
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNAuthLogGroupName
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, @message
        | parse @message '*"' as event
        | filter event.eventType in ["connection-log"]
        | stats sum(toLong(event.bytesIn)) as ingressBytes by bin(1h), event.endpointId, event.authMethod
        | sort @timestamp desc

  ClientVPNDataTransferEgress:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: 'ClientVPN/DataTransferEgress'
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNAuthLogGroupName
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, @message
        | parse @message '*"' as event
        | filter event.eventType in ["connection-log"]
        | stats sum(toLong(event.bytesOut)) as egressBytes by bin(1h), event.endpointId, event.authMethod
        | sort @timestamp desc

  ClientVPNUserActivity:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: 'ClientVPN/UserActivity'
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNAuthLogGroupName
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, @message
        | parse @message '*"' as event
        | filter event.eventType in ["connection-log"]
        | filter event.authMethod in ["AD/SAML", "mutual-auth", "mixed-auth"]
        | stats count() as connections, count_distinct(event.username) as distinctUsers by bin(1h), event.authMethod
        | sort @timestamp desc

  ClientVPNEndpointUsage:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: 'ClientVPN/EndpointUsage'
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNAuthLogGroupName
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, @message
        | parse @message '*"' as event
        | filter event.eventType in ["connection-log"]
        | fields startTime = toLong(event.connectionStartTime), endTime = toLong(event.connectionEndTime)
        | fields duration = (endTime - startTime) / 1000
        | stats count() as totalConnections, avg(duration) as avgDuration, sum(toLong(event.bytesIn) + toLong(event.bytesOut)) as totalBytes by event.endpointId
        | sort totalBytes desc
        | limit 20

  ClientVPNDistinctUsers:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: 'ClientVPN/DistinctUsers'
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNAuthLogGroupName
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, @message
        | parse @message '*"' as event
        | filter event.eventType in ["connection-log"]
        | filter event.authMethod in ["AD/SAML", "mutual-auth", "mixed-auth"]
        | stats count_distinct(event.username) as distinctUsers by event.authMethod, event.endpointId
        | sort distinctUsers desc
        | limit 50

  ClientVPNAuthBreakdown:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: 'ClientVPN/AuthBreakdown'
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNAuthLogGroupName
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, @message
        | parse @message '*"' as event
        | filter event.eventType in ["connection-log"]
        | filter event.authMethod in ["AD/SAML", "mutual-auth", "mixed-auth"]
        | fields startTime = toLong(event.connectionStartTime), endTime = toLong(event.connectionEndTime)
        | fields duration = (endTime - startTime) / 1000
        | stats count_distinct(event.username) as uniqueUsers, count() as totalConnections, avg(duration) as avgDuration, sum(toLong(event.bytesIn) + toLong(event.bytesOut)) as totalBytes by event.authMethod
        | sort totalBytes desc

  ClientVNPDashboard:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard
    Properties:
      DashboardName: !Ref DashboardName
      DashboardBody:
        Fn::Sub:
          - |
            [
              {
                "x": 0,
                "y": 0,
                "width": 8,
                "height": 6,
                "type": "log",
                "properties": {
                  "metrics": [
                    [
                      {
                        "id": "q1",
                        "queryDefinitionId": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${ConnDurationsId}",
                        "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                        "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}"
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "view": "timeSeries",
                  "stacked": true,
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Connection Durations",
                  "start": "-${TimeRange}",
                  "end": "P0D"
                }
              },
              {
                "x": 8,
                "y": 0,
                "width": 8,
                "height": 6,
                "type": "log",
                "properties": {
                  "metrics": [
                    [
                      {
                        "id": "q1",
                        "queryDefinitionId": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${IngressId}",
                        "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                        "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}"
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "view": "timeSeries",
                  "stacked": true,
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Data Transfer Ingress",
                  "start": "-${TimeRange}",
                  "end": "P0D"
                }
              },
              {
                "x": 16,
                "y": 0,
                "width": 8,
                "height": 6,
                "type": "log",
                "properties": {
                  "metrics": [
                    [
                      {
                        "id": "q1",
                        "queryDefinitionId": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${EgressId}",
                        "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                        "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}"
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "view": "timeSeries",
                  "stacked": true,
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Data Transfer Egress",
                  "start": "-${TimeRange}",
                  "end": "P0D"
                }
              },
              {
                "x": 0,
                "y": 6,
                "width": 24,
                "height": 6,
                "type": "log",
                "properties": {
                  "metrics": [
                    [
                      {
                        "id": "q1",
                        "queryDefinitionId": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${EndpointUsageId}",
                        "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                        "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}"
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "view": "table",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Endpoint Usage",
                  "start": "-${TimeRange}",
                  "end": "P0D"
                }
              },
              {
                "x": 0,
                "y": 12,
                "width": 12,
                "height": 6,
                "type": "log",
                "properties": {
                  "metrics": [
                    [
                      {
                        "id": "q1",
                        "queryDefinitionId": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${DistinctUsersId}",
                        "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                        "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}"
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "view": "table",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Distinct Users",
                  "start": "-${TimeRange}",
                  "end": "P0D"
                }
              },
              {
                "x": 12,
                "y": 12,
                "width": 12,
                "height": 6,
                "type": "log",
                "properties": {
                  "metrics": [
                    [
                      {
                        "id": "q1",
                        "queryDefinitionId": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${AuthBreakdownId}",
                        "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                        "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}"
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "view": "table",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Auth Breakdown",
                  "start": "-${TimeRange}",
                  "end": "P0D"
                }
              }
            ]
          - ConnDurationsId: !Ref ClientVPNConnectionDurations
            IngressId: !Ref ClientVPNDataTransferIngress
            EgressId: !Ref ClientVPNDataTransferEgress
            EndpointUsageId: !Ref ClientVPNEndpointUsage
            DistinctUsersId: !Ref ClientVPNDistinctUsers
            AuthBreakdownId: !Ref ClientVPNAuthBreakdown

Outputs:
  DashboardName:
    Value: !Ref ClientVNPDashboard
    Description: 'Name of the created CloudWatch Dashboard'
  DashboardArn:
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudwatch:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:dashboard/${!Ref ClientVNPDashboard}'
    Description: 'ARN of the created CloudWatch Dashboard'
  QueryDefinitions:
    Value:
      Fn::Sub:
        - |
          {
            "ConnectionDurations": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${ConnDurationsId}",
            "DataTransferIngress": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${IngressId}",
            "DataTransferEgress": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${EgressId}",
            "UserActivity": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${UserActivityId}",
            "EndpointUsage": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${EndpointUsageId}",
            "DistinctUsers": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${DistinctUsersId}",
            "AuthBreakdown": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:query-definition/${AuthBreakdownId}"
          }
        - ConnDurationsId: !Ref ClientVPNConnectionDurations
          IngressId: !Ref ClientVPNDataTransferIngress
          EgressId: !Ref ClientVPNDataTransferEgress
          UserActivityId: !Ref ClientVPNUserActivity
          EndpointUsageId: !Ref ClientVPNEndpointUsage
          DistinctUsersId: !Ref ClientVPNDistinctUsers
          AuthBreakdownId: !Ref ClientVPNAuthBreakdown
    Description: 'Map of QueryDefinition names to their ARNs'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Metadata:
  Description: 'DynamoDB table with Local Secondary Index (LSI) on gameTitle and Global Secondary Index (GSI) on userId/topScore, configured for production use with PAY_PER_REQUEST billing, SSE, PITR, and deletion protection.'
Resources:
  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Table-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: timestamp
          AttributeType: N
        - AttributeName: gameTitle
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: userId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: topScore
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: timestamp
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      LocalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: GameTitleIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: id
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: gameTitle
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: KEYS_ONLY
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: UserTopScoreIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: userId
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: topScore
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
Outputs:
  TableArn:
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.Arn
  LocalSecondaryIndexName:
    Value: GameTitleIndex
  GlobalSecondaryIndexName:
    Value: UserTopScoreIndex

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IoT Core to SQS via SNS data pipeline'

Parameters:
  FifoQueue:
    Type: String
    Default: 'no'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'yes'
      - 'no'
    Description: 'Enable FIFO queue (requires .fifo suffix and content-based deduplication)'

Conditions:
  IsFifo: !Equals [!Ref FifoQueue, 'yes']

Resources:
  SqsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'CMK for ${AWS::StackName} SQS queues'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-Data*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SqsKey'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  SnsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'CMK for ${AWS::StackName} SNS topic'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-DataTopic'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SnsKey'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  DataDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !If
        - IsFifo
        - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataDLQ.fifo'
        - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataDLQ'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsKmsKey
      FifoQueue: !If [IsFifo, true, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      ContentBasedDeduplication: !If [IsFifo, true, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataDLQ'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  DataQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !If
        - IsFifo
        - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataQueue.fifo'
        - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataQueue'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsKmsKey
      FifoQueue: !If [IsFifo, true, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      ContentBasedDeduplication: !If [IsFifo, true, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DataDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 5
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataQueue'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  DataQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DataQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt DataQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref DataTopic

  DataTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataTopic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SnsKmsKey
      DisplayName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataTopic'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataTopic'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  DataSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref DataTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt DataQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: "true"

  IoTRuleRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTRuleRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: iot.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SNSPublishPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref DataTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:ReEncrypt*
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !GetAtt SnsKmsKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTRuleRole'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

  DeviceDataRule:
    Type: AWS::IoT::TopicRule
    Properties:
      RuleName: DeviceDataRule
      TopicRulePayload:
        Sql: "SELECT * FROM 'device/data'"
        Description: 'Route messages from device/data topic to SNS'
        RuleDisabled: "false"
        Actions:
          - Sns:
              RoleArn: !GetAtt IoTRuleRole.Arn
              TargetArn: !Ref DataTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DeviceDataRule'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: IoTDataPipeline

Outputs:
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS Data Queue'
    Value: !Ref DataQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SQSQueueUrl'

  SQSQueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SQS Data Queue'
    Value: !GetAtt DataQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SQSQueueArn'

  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS Data Topic'
    Value: !Ref DataTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SNSTopicArn'

  IoTRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IoT Topic Rule'
    Value: !GetAtt DeviceDataRule.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTRuleArn'

  SubscriptionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS Subscription'
    Value: !Ref DataSubscription
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SubscriptionArn'

  SqsKmsKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SQS KMS Key'
    Value: !GetAtt SqsKmsKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SqsKmsKeyArn'

  SnsKmsKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS KMS Key'
    Value: !GetAtt SnsKmsKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SnsKmsKeyArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket integrated with EventBridge and SNS to notify on object creation events.'

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-events-bucket-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: 'alias/aws/s3'
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  SNSKMSKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for SNS topic encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      EnableKeyRotation: true

  SNSTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSKMSKey
      TopicName: !Sub 'ObjectCreatedNotifications-${AWS::StackName}'

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy'
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowEventBridgePublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt EventBridgeRule.Arn
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSTopic

  EventBridgeRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Capture S3 Object Created events from the specified bucket'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - 'Object Created (All)'
        detail:
          bucket:
            name:
              - !Ref S3Bucket
      Name: !Sub 'S3ObjectCreatedRule-${AWS::StackName}'
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref SNSTopic
          Id: NotifySNS

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'

  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic'
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SNSTopicArn'

  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge rule'
    Value: !GetAtt EventBridgeRule.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeRuleArn'
