final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  CloudFormation template that creates a real-time data ingestion and storage pipeline
  using Amazon Kinesis Data Stream, Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream, and S3 bucket.

Parameters:
  KinesisStreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: RealTimeDataStream
    Description: Name for the Kinesis Data Stream
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis Stream
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: realtime-data
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name
  RetentionHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 24
    MaxValue: 8760
    Description: Retention period in hours for the Kinesis Stream (24-8760)
  FirehoseBufferSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 128
    Description: Buffer size in MBs for Kinesis Data Firehose (1-128)
  FirehoseBufferInterval:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 900
    Description: Buffer interval in seconds for Kinesis Data Firehose (60-900)

Resources:
  KinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref KinesisStreamName
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref RetentionHours
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis

  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for S3 bucket encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'

  S3EncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-s3-encryption-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref S3EncryptionKey

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  FirehoseLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/kinesis-firehose/${AWS::StackName}'
      RetentionInDays: 7

  FirehoseLogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
      LogStreamName: !Sub 'delivery-${AWS::StackName}'

  FirehoseDeliveryRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FirehoseDeliveryRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FirehosePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                  - kinesis:ListShards
                  - kinesis:SubscribeToShard
                Resource: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                  - kms:ReEncrypt*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !GetAtt S3EncryptionKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:PutObjectRetention
                  - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:ListBucketMultipartUploads
                  - s3:GetBucketVersioning
                Resource: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:${FirehoseLogGroup}:log-stream:${FirehoseLogStream}'

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedObjectUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject*'
            Resource: !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'aws:kms'
          - Sid: FirehoseDeliveryAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:PutObjectRetention
              - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:ListBucketMultipartUploads
              - s3:GetBucketVersioning
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'

  RealTimeFirehose:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: RealTimeFirehose
      KinesisStreamSourceConfiguration:
        KinesisStreamARN: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
      S3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          SizeInMBs: !Ref FirehoseBufferSize
          IntervalInSeconds: !Ref FirehoseBufferInterval
        ErrorOutputPrefix: errors/
        Prefix: data/
        EncryptionConfiguration:
          NoEncryptionConfig: 'NoEncryption'
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref FirehoseLogStream

Outputs:
  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
  FirehoseDeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream
    Value: !GetAtt RealTimeFirehose.Arn
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: Automated monitoring for AWS Secrets Manager secret lifecycle events (create, update, access) with SNS alerts

Parameters:
  RuleName:
    Type: String
    Default: SecretsManagerLifecycleRule
    Description: Name of the EventBridge Rule
  EventNames:
    Type: String
    Default: CreateSecret,UpdateSecret,PutSecretValue,DescribeSecret,GetSecretValue
    Description: Comma-separated list of Secrets Manager event names to monitor

Resources:
  SecretsManagerAlertsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "CMK for SNS topic encryption - Secrets Manager alerts"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SecretsManagerLifecycleAlerts:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: SecretsManagerLifecycleAlerts
      DisplayName: Alerts for Secrets Manager Create/Update/Access Events
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  EventBridgeSecretsManagerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EventBridgeSecretsManagerRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - events.amazonaws.com
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SNSPublishPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SecretsManagerLifecycleAlerts
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:SourceAccount: !Ref "AWS::AccountId"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SecretsManagerLifecycleRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref RuleName
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.cloudtrail
        'detail-type':
          - AWS API Call via CloudTrail
        detail:
          eventSource:
            - secretsmanager.amazonaws.com
          eventName:
            Fn::Split:
              - ","
              - !Ref EventNames
      Targets:
        - Id: SNSTarget
          Arn: !Ref SecretsManagerLifecycleAlerts
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeSecretsManagerRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: Subscribe email/SMS/Lambda to this ARN for secret lifecycle alerts
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerLifecycleAlerts
  RuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Rule monitoring Secrets Manager events
    Value: !GetAtt SecretsManagerLifecycleRule.Arn
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM Role used by EventBridge to publish to SNS
    Value: !GetAtt EventBridgeSecretsManagerRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Demonstrates secure parameter storage and retrieval workflows using AWS Systems Manager (SSM) Parameter Store and Secrets Manager
  for centralized configuration management in serverless applications.
Parameters:
  Namespace:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: >-
      Custom namespace path (e.g., /myapp/config/). Leave empty for default stack-specific (/[StackName]/config/).
Conditions:
  UseCustomNamespace: !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Ref Namespace
      - ''
Resources:
  DemoSSMParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !If
        - UseCustomNamespace
        - !Sub "${Namespace}DemoParam"
        - !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/DemoParam"
      Type: String
      Value: "This is A/B"
      Description: "Non-sensitive configuration example"
      DataType: text
  DemoSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DemoSecret"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 20
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureConfigDemo
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaExecutionRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureConfigDemo
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  LambdaLoggingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaLoggingPolicy"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - logs:CreateLogGroup
              - logs:CreateLogStream
              - logs:PutLogEvents
            Resource: '*'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
  LambdaConfigAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaConfigAccessPolicy"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - ssm:GetParametersByPath
              - ssm:GetParameter
            Resource: !Sub
              - 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${ns}*'
              - ns: !If
                  - UseCustomNamespace
                  - !Ref Namespace
                  - !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/config/'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - ssm:DescribeParameters
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
            Resource: !Ref DemoSecret
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
  DemoLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DemoFunction"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import logging
          import os
          import boto3

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              logger = logging.getLogger()
              logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
              try:
                  ssm_client = boto3.client('ssm')
                  namespace = os.environ['NAMESPACE']
                  params_response = ssm_client.get_parameters_by_path(
                      Path=namespace,
                      Recursive=True,
                      WithDecryption=False
                  )
                  for param in params_response.get('Parameters', []):
                      logger.info(f"SSM Parameter Name: {param['Name']}, Value: {param['Value']}")
                  secrets_client = boto3.client('secretsmanager')
                  secret_arn = os.environ['SECRET_ARN']
                  secret_response = secrets_client.get_secret_value(SecretId=secret_arn)
                  secret_dict = json.loads(secret_response['SecretString'])
                  logger.info(f"Secret Username: {secret_dict.get('username')}")
                  logger.info(f"Secret Password: {secret_dict.get('password')}")
                  return {
                      'statusCode': 200,
                      'body': json.dumps({
                          'message': 'Parameters and secrets retrieved successfully!',
                          'param_count': len(params_response.get('Parameters', []))
                      })
                  }
              except Exception as e:
                  logger.error(f"Error retrieving config: {str(e)}")
                  return {
                      'statusCode': 500,
                      'body': json.dumps({'error': str(e)})
                  }
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Environment:
        Variables:
          NAMESPACE: !If
            - UseCustomNamespace
            - !Ref Namespace
            - !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/config/'
          SECRET_ARN: !Ref DemoSecret
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureConfigDemo
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
Outputs:
  SSMParameterName:
    Description: Name of the SSM Parameter
    Value: !Ref DemoSSMParameter
  SecretsManagerSecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager Secret
    Value: !Ref DemoSecret
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda Function
    Value: !Ref DemoLambdaFunction

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for deploying a basic sample Lambda function

Parameters:
  FunctionName:
    Type: String
    Default: SampleLambda
  Runtime:
    Type: String
    Default: python3.12
  Timeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3
  MemorySize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 128

Resources:
  LambdaSampleExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaSampleExecutionRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  SampleLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-${FunctionName}"
      Runtime: !Ref Runtime
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaSampleExecutionRole.Arn
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Hello from Lambda!')
              }
      Timeout: !Ref Timeout
      MemorySize: !Ref MemorySize
      Architectures:
        - x86_64
      Description: Sample Lambda function for CloudFormation deployment demonstration
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: LambdaSample

Outputs:
  SampleLambdaFunctionName:
    Description: The name of the Lambda function
    Value: !Ref SampleLambdaFunction
  SampleLambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambdaFunction.Arn
  SampleLambdaInvokeArn:
    Description: Invoke ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambdaFunction.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates two IAM roles and instance profiles for EC2 instances with read-only access to IAM metadata, allowing retrieval and listing of IAM resources.'

Resources:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1'

  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2'

  EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile1:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1

  EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile2:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2

Outputs:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1Arn:
    Description: ARN of the first EC2 IAM read-only role
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1.Arn
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2Arn:
    Description: ARN of the second EC2 IAM read-only role
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2.Arn
  EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile1Arn:
    Description: ARN of the first EC2 IAM read-only instance profile
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile1.Arn
  EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile2Arn:
    Description: ARN of the second EC2 IAM read-only instance profile
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile2.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a production-ready, network-isolated MySQL RDS instance (db.r6i.large) with io1 Provisioned IOPS storage, deployed across two private subnets in different AZs within a dedicated VPC.'

Parameters:
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'mydatabase'
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 64
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][0-9a-zA-Z-]*$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must begin with a letter and contain only alphanumeric characters and hyphens. Up to 64 characters.'
    Description: 'The name of the initial database to create.'
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 16
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must begin with a letter and contain only alphanumeric characters. Up to 16 characters.'
    Description: 'The master username for the RDS instance.'
  AllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    MinValue: 100
    MaxValue: 16384
    Description: 'The allocated storage size in GiB (io1 requires minimum 100 GiB).'
  Iops:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1000
    MinValue: 1000
    MaxValue: 16000
    Description: 'The Provisioned IOPS (io1) value.'
  BackupRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 7
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 35
    Description: 'The number of days to retain automated backups.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetB'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub 'Private subnets for ${AWS::StackName} RDS instance in ${AWS::Region}'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub 'Security group allowing inbound MySQL 3306 access from VPC CIDR for ${AWS::StackName}'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSSecurityGroup'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MonitoringRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: monitoring.rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonRDSEnhancedMonitoringRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSMonitoringRole'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.45'
      DBInstanceClass: db.r6i.large
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref AllocatedStorage
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: !Ref Iops
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserSecret: {}
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mysql'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      MultiAZ: true
      DeletionProtection: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: !Ref BackupRetentionPeriod
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'mon:03:00-mon:04:00'
      StorageEncrypted: true
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      MonitoringInterval: 60
      MonitoringRoleArn: !GetAtt MonitoringRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySQLDBInstance'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: 'The endpoint address of the MySQL RDS instance.'
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  DBInstanceIdentifier:
    Description: 'The identifier of the MySQL RDS instance.'
    Value: !Ref DBInstance
  VPCId:
    Description: 'The ID of the dedicated VPC.'
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PrivateSubnetAId:
    Description: 'The ID of Private Subnet A.'
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
  PrivateSubnetBId:
    Description: 'The ID of Private Subnet B.'
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetB

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
Description: CloudFormation template for MySQL RDS instance with basic networking.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  GatewayToInternet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  PublicInternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for RDS instance across two AZs
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup'

  RdsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for MySQL RDS instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RdsSecurityGroup'

  MySQLInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: MySQLInstance
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.small
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.45
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: '{{resolve:ssm-secure:mysql-master-password:1}}'
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      StorageEncrypted: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: 03:00-04:00
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: sun:05:00-sun:06:00
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RdsSecurityGroup
      DeletionProtection: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySQLInstance'

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: RDS Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLInstance.Endpoint.Address

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure MySQL RDS deployment with VPC isolation and Secrets Manager

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-privatesubnet1"

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-privatesubnet2"

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-route-table"

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub "${AWS::StackName} DB Subnet Group"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-db-subnet-group"

  EndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub "SG allowing RDS access to VPC Endpoints for ${AWS::StackName}"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-endpoint-sg"

  S3Endpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.s3"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      RouteTableIds:
        - !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      VpcEndpointType: Gateway
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-s3-endpoint"

  SecretsManagerEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.secretsmanager"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EndpointSecurityGroup
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-secretsmanager-endpoint"

  RdsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub "Security group for ${AWS::StackName} RDS instance"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg"

  CustomMySQLParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Family: mysql8.0
      Description: !Sub "Custom MySQL 8.0 parameter group for ${AWS::StackName}"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-mysql-param-group"

  RdsAdminSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-admin-secret"
      Description: !Sub "RDS admin credentials for ${AWS::StackName}"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"admin","password":"<password>"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 30
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\'
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-admin-secret"

  RdsInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DependsOn: SecretsManagerEndpoint
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds"
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.40
      MasterUserSecret:
        SecretArn: !Ref RdsAdminSecret
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RdsSecurityGroup
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref CustomMySQLParameterGroup
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      StorageEncrypted: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DeletionProtection: true
      MultiAZ: false
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds"

Outputs:
  RdsEndpointAddress:
    Description: RDS Instance Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt RdsInstance.Endpoint.Address
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}::RdsEndpoint::Address"

  RdsAdminSecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret for RDS admin credentials
    Value: !Ref RdsAdminSecret
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}::RdsAdminSecret::Arn"

  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}::Vpc::Id"

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of Private Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}::PrivateSubnetIds"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure S3 buckets with SSE, blocked public access, HTTPS-only policy, and access logging enabled.

Resources:
  AccessLogsBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-access-logs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-access-logs"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  AccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub "${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AccessLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  ReplicasKmsKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub "KMS key for ${AWS::StackName}-replicas bucket"
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableIAMUserPermissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowS3Access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub "${AWS::Region}.s3.${AWS::URLSuffix}"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-replicas-kms"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ReplicasBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ReplicasKmsKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
        LogFilePrefix: logs/
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-replicas"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ReplicasBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ReplicasBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt ReplicasBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${ReplicasBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  AccessLogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the Access Logs bucket
    Value: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
  AccessLogsBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the Access Logs bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AccessLogsBucket.Arn
  ReplicasBucketName:
    Description: Name of the Replicas bucket
    Value: !Ref ReplicasBucket
  ReplicasBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the Replicas bucket
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicasBucket.Arn
  ReplicasKmsKeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS key for Replicas bucket
    Value: !Ref ReplicasKmsKey
  ReplicasKmsKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key for Replicas bucket
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicasKmsKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template implementing an S3 bucket with server-side encryption, versioning, public access blocks, HTTPS enforcement, and a Lambda trigger on object creation events with key filters."

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: "my-trigger-bucket"
    Description: "Prefix for the S3 bucket name to ensure uniqueness."
  LambdaRuntime:
    Type: String
    Default: "python3.12"
    Description: "Runtime for the Lambda function."
  LambdaHandler:
    Type: String
    Default: "index.lambda_handler"
    Description: "Handler for the Lambda function."

Resources:
  BucketEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
      EnableKeyRotation: true

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-lambda-execution-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-s3-access-policy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}/*"
                  - !GetAtt BucketEncryptionKey.Arn

  S3TriggerLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-lambda"
      Runtime: !Ref LambdaRuntime
      Handler: !Ref LambdaHandler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.parse

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              print("Received event: " + json.dumps(event, indent=2))
              for record in event['Records']:
                  bucket = record['s3']['bucket']['name']
                  key = urllib.parse.unquote_plus(record['s3']['object']['key'], encoding='utf-8')
                  print(f"New object created: bucket={bucket}, key={key}")
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Event processed successfully!')
              }

  S3InvokeLambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambda.Arn
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
      SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"

  TriggerBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref BucketEncryptionKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Function: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambda.Arn
            Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Filter:
              S3Key:
                Rules:
                  - Name: prefix
                    Value: uploads/
                  - Name: suffix
                    Value: .jpg

  TriggerBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref TriggerBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !Ref TriggerBucket
              - !Sub "${TriggerBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": false

Outputs:
  TriggerBucketName:
    Description: "Name of the S3 bucket that triggers the Lambda function."
    Value: !Ref TriggerBucket
  TriggerBucketArn:
    Description: "ARN of the S3 bucket."
    Value: !GetAtt TriggerBucket.Arn
  S3TriggerLambdaName:
    Description: "Name of the Lambda function triggered by S3 events."
    Value: !Ref S3TriggerLambda
  S3TriggerLambdaArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Lambda function."
    Value: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambda.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "Deploys a secure ECR repository with root user policy for Kubernetes container image management."

Resources:
  KubernetesECRRepo:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName:
        Fn::Lower:
          Fn::Sub: "${AWS::StackName}-k8s-repo"
      ImageTagMutability: IMMUTABLE
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      EncryptionConfiguration:
        EncryptionType: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            Fn::Lower:
              Fn::Sub: "${AWS::StackName}-k8s-repo"
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: KubernetesContainerImages
      RepositoryPolicyText:
        Fn::Sub:
          - |
            {
              "Version": "2012-10-17",
              "Statement": [
                {
                  "Effect": "Allow",
                  "Principal": {
                    "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
                  },
                  "Action": [
                    "ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability",
                    "ecr:BatchGetImage",
                    "ecr:BatchDeleteImage",
                    "ecr:CompleteLayerUpload",
                    "ecr:DeleteRepository",
                    "ecr:DeleteRepositoryPolicy",
                    "ecr:DescribeImages",
                    "ecr:DescribeRepositories",
                    "ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer",
                    "ecr:GetRepositoryPolicy",
                    "ecr:InitiateLayerUpload",
                    "ecr:ListImages",
                    "ecr:PutImage",
                    "ecr:SetRepositoryPolicy",
                    "ecr:StartImageScan",
                    "ecr:UploadLayerPart"
                  ],
                  "Resource": [
                    "arn:aws:ecr:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/${KubernetesECRRepo}",
                    "arn:aws:ecr:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/${KubernetesECRRepo}/*"
                  ],
                  "Condition": {
                    "StringEquals": {
                      "aws:SecureTransport": "true"
                    }
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
          - KubernetesECRRepo:
              Fn::Lower:
                Fn::Sub: "${AWS::StackName}-k8s-repo"

Outputs:
  RepositoryUri:
    Description: "Repository URI for Kubernetes image pull secrets"
    Value: !GetAtt KubernetesECRRepo.RepositoryUri

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an SQS FIFO Queue with exactly-once processing guarantees, message ordering, deduplication, SSE-SQS encryption, and optional Dead Letter Queue.'

Parameters:
  QueueNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MyFifoQueue
    Description: 'Prefix for the FIFO queue name (will append .fifo)'
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    Description: 'Environment tag value for cost allocation and management'
  CreateDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: String
    Default: 'No'
    AllowedValues: ['Yes', 'No']
    Description: 'Whether to create a Dead Letter Queue (Yes/No)'

Conditions:
  CreateDLQ: !Equals [!Ref CreateDeadLetterQueue, 'No']

Resources:
  SqsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'CMK for ${QueueNamePrefix} SQS FIFO queue encryption'
      Enabled: true
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow use of the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: !Sub 'sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:ListGrants
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${QueueNamePrefix}-encryption-key'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  SqsDlqQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Condition: CreateDLQ
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueNamePrefix}-dlq'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsEncryptionKey
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${QueueNamePrefix}-dlq'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  SqsFifoQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueNamePrefix}.fifo'
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      DeduplicationScope: messageGroup
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsEncryptionKey
      RedrivePolicy: !If
        - CreateDLQ
        - !Sub
          - '{"deadLetterTargetArn":"${DLQArn}","maxReceiveCount":1}'
          - DLQArn: !GetAtt SqsDlqQueue.Arn
        - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${QueueNamePrefix}-fifo-queue'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS FIFO Queue for integration and reference'
    Value: !Ref SqsFifoQueue

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a secure SQS Standard Queue with server-side encryption using customer-managed KMS key and a queue policy enforcing account-level access isolation.'

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'standard-queue'
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 80
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$'
    Description: 'Base name of the SQS queue (prefixed with stack name in resource).'
  VisibilityTimeoutSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: 'Visibility timeout for the queue in seconds.'
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: 'Message retention period in seconds.'
  MaximumMessageSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 262144
    MinValue: 1024
    MaxValue: 262144
    Description: 'Maximum message size in bytes.'
  ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 20
    Description: 'Wait time for ReceiveMessage in seconds.'

Resources:
  SqsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for SQS Standard Queue SSE'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sqs-kms-key'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  StandardQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${QueueName}'
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSeconds
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      MaximumMessageSize: !Ref MaximumMessageSize
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: !Ref ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsKmsKey
      DelaySeconds: 0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref QueueName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SqsQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref StandardQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt StandardQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the created SQS Standard Queue.'
    Value: !Ref StandardQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the created SQS Standard Queue.'
    Value: !GetAtt StandardQueue.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public subnets across two fixed Availability Zones and one private subnet in the first AZ, using static RegionMap for AZ persistence.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b
    us-east-2:
      AZ1: us-east-2a
      AZ2: us-east-2b
    us-west-1:
      AZ1: us-west-1a
      AZ2: us-west-1b
    us-west-2:
      AZ1: us-west-2a
      AZ2: us-west-2b
    eu-west-1:
      AZ1: eu-west-1a
      AZ2: eu-west-1b
    ap-southeast-1:
      AZ1: ap-southeast-1a
      AZ2: ap-southeast-1b
    ap-northeast-1:
      AZ1: ap-northeast-1a
      AZ2: ap-northeast-1b

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [!Ref 'AWS::Region', RegionMap, AZ1]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Type
          Value: Public
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [!Ref 'AWS::Region', RegionMap, AZ2]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Type
          Value: Public
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [!Ref 'AWS::Region', RegionMap, AZ1]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1'
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RouteTableAssociationPublic1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  RouteTableAssociationPublic2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  RouteTableAssociationPrivate1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of Public Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds'

  PrivateSubnetId:
    Description: Private Subnet ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetId'

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: Public Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

  PrivateRouteTableId:
    Description: Private Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableId'

  AZ1:
    Description: First Availability Zone used
    Value: !FindInMap [!Ref 'AWS::Region', RegionMap, AZ1]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZ1'

  AZ2:
    Description: Second Availability Zone used
    Value: !FindInMap [!Ref 'AWS::Region', RegionMap, AZ2]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZ2'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |
  Creates a secure S3 bucket with integrated AWS KMS encryption using a custom key and alias,
  versioning enabled, public access blocks, lifecycle management rules for cost optimization,
  organizational tags, and a bucket policy enforcing HTTPS transport and specific KMS encryption.

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Custom KMS key for S3 bucket server-side encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root account full access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service principal'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow account users/services via S3'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'S3Encryption'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  S3KeyAlias:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Alias'
    Properties:
      AliasName: 'alias/my-s3-encryption-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref 'S3EncryptionKey'

  SecureDataBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-secure-data-bucket-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt 'S3EncryptionKey.Arn'
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: 'NonCurrentVersionTransitions'
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: 60
                StorageClass: GLACIER
          - Id: 'ExpireVersions'
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 365

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC with public and private subnets across 2 AZs, Internet Gateway, Managed NAT Gateways (one per AZ) for private subnet outbound internet access, and associated route tables.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  VpcName:
    Type: String
    Default: VPC
  AvailabilityZones:
    Type: List<AWS::EC2::AvailabilityZone::Name>
    Default:
      - Fn::Select:
          - 1
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      - Fn::Select:
          - 2
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-VPC'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-IGW'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !Ref AvailabilityZones]
      CidrBlock:
        Fn::Select:
          - 1
          - Fn::Cidr:
              - !Ref VpcCidr
              - 24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !Ref AvailabilityZones]
      CidrBlock:
        Fn::Select:
          - 2
          - Fn::Cidr:
              - !Ref VpcCidr
              - 24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !Ref AvailabilityZones]
      CidrBlock:
        Fn::Select:
          - 3
          - Fn::Cidr:
              - !Ref VpcCidr
              - 24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-PrivateSubnet1'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !Ref AvailabilityZones]
      CidrBlock:
        Fn::Select:
          - 4
          - Fn::Cidr:
              - !Ref VpcCidr
              - 24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-PrivateSubnet2'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-EIP1'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-EIP2'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-NatGw1'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-NatGw2'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-PrivateRouteTable1'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${VpcName}-PrivateRouteTable2'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref VpcName

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID (AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1Id'
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID (AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2Id'
  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 1 ID (AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1Id'
  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 2 ID (AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2Id'
  NatGateway1Id:
    Description: NAT Gateway 1 ID (AZ1)
    Value: !Ref NatGateway1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGateway1Id'
  NatGateway2Id:
    Description: NAT Gateway 2 ID (AZ2)
    Value: !Ref NatGateway2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGateway2Id'
  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: Internet Gateway ID
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGatewayId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates an Amazon Data Firehose stream with server-side encryption using AWS Managed keys and destination error logging enabled to a created Amazon CloudWatch log group and log stream.

Parameters:
  DeliveryStreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyFirehoseStream
  LogGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/kinesisfirehose/MyFirehoseErrors
  RetentionInDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 14

Resources:
  BucketEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow use of the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: FirehoseErrorLogging

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'firehose-${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-bucket'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref BucketEncryptionKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: FirehoseErrorLogging
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FirehoseDestination

  FirehoseServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehosePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject*
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:GetObject*
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion*
                  - s3:AbortMultipartUpload*
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt BucketEncryptionKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:PutResourcePolicy
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:${LogGroup}:*'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: FirehoseErrorLogging

  LogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroupName
      RetentionInDays: !Ref RetentionInDays
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: FirehoseErrorLogging

  LogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroup
      LogStreamName: !Sub '${DeliveryStreamName}-S3Errors'

  DeliveryStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Ref DeliveryStreamName
      DeliveryStreamType: DirectPut
      DeliveryStreamEncryptionConfigurationInput:
        KeyType: AWS_OWNED_CMK
      S3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseServiceRole.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          IntervalInSeconds: 60
          SizeInMBs: 1
        CompressionFormat: GZIP
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref LogStream
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: FirehoseErrorLogging

Outputs:
  DeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:firehose:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:deliverystream/${DeliveryStreamName}'
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket used as Firehose destination
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  LogGroupArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Log Group for Firehose error logging
    Value: !GetAtt LogGroup.Arn
  LogStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Log Stream for Firehose destination errors
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:${LogGroup}:log-stream:${LogStream}'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an IAM Role and Instance Profile for EC2 instances with restricted read-only access to AWS IAM metadata and resources, enabling them to retrieve and list IAM resources without modification rights.'

Resources:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Role'
      Path: '/ec2/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: '*'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Access
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile'
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: 'EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Profile'
      Path: '/ec2/'
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IAMReadOnlyRole

Outputs:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EC2 IAM ReadOnly Role'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IAMReadOnlyRoleArn'

  EC2IAMReadOnlyProfileArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EC2 IAM ReadOnly Instance Profile'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IAMReadOnlyProfileArn'
