AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Environment-specific DynamoDB tables for supporter product data with PROD provisioned throughput and auto-scaling, CODE on-demand, encryption, TTL, and PITR backups."

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ["PROD", "CODE"]
    Default: "CODE"
    Description: "Deployment environment (PROD or CODE) to drive table configuration."

Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, "PROD"]

Resources:
  SupporterProductDataTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "SupporterProductData-${Stage}"
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: "supporterId"
          KeyType: "HASH"
        - AttributeName: "productId"
          KeyType: "RANGE"
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: "supporterId"
          AttributeType: "S"
        - AttributeName: "productId"
          AttributeType: "S"
      BillingMode: !If [IsProd, "PROVISIONED", "PAY_PER_REQUEST"]
      ProvisionedThroughput: !If
        - IsProd
        - ReadCapacityUnits: 20
          WriteCapacityUnits: 5
        - !Ref "AWS::NoValue"
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: "expiryDate"
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "SupporterProductData-${Stage}"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: "Backup"
          Value: "Enabled"

  WriteScalableTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      MaxCapacity: 500
      MinCapacity: 5
      ResourceId: !Sub "table/${SupporterProductDataTable}"
      ScalableDimension: "dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits"
      ServiceNamespace: "dynamodb"

  WriteTargetTrackingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      PolicyName: "WriteTargetTrackingPolicy"
      PolicyType: "TargetTrackingScaling"
      ResourceId: !Sub "table/${SupporterProductDataTable}"
      ScalableDimension: "dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits"
      ServiceNamespace: "dynamodb"
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: "DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization"
          ResourceLabel: !Sub "table/${SupporterProductDataTable}"
        TargetValue: 70.0

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: "Name of the DynamoDB table"
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTable
  TableArn:
    Description: "ARN of the DynamoDB table"
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTable.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys an AWS EC2 IPAM for centralized IP address management across regions with exports for IPAM ID, ARN, and default public/private scope IDs for cross-stack VPC/subnet integration.'

Resources:
  IPAM:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAM
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'Central IP address management for VPC allocations - ${AWS::StackName}'
      OperatingRegions:
        - RegionName: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  IPAMId:
    Description: Unique ID of the IPAM resource
    Value: !Ref IPAM
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAMId'
  IPAMArn:
    Description: ARN of the IPAM for cross-stack IAM policy references
    Value: !GetAtt IPAM.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAMArn'
  PrivateDefaultScopeId:
    Description: ID of the default private IPv4 scope for VPC private subnet allocations
    Value: !GetAtt IPAM.PrivateDefaultScopeId
    Export:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates three IAM managed policies for S3 app access and DynamoDB/RDS protection.

Parameters:
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ios-apps.sagebridge.org

Resources:
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: S3AccessForIOSApp
      Description: Grants an iOS application read/write access to a specific S3 bucket (ios-apps.sagebridge.org), including object operations (upload, download, delete) and bucket listing/location permissions.
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3BucketName}'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3BucketName}/*'

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
      Description: Explicitly denies deletion or schema-modification actions (e.g., DeleteTable, UpdateTable) to prevent accidental data loss in DynamoDB.
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
            Resource: '*'

  RDSProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: RDSProtectionPolicy
      Description: Blocks destructive RDS operations (e.g., DeleteDBInstance, DeleteDBCluster) to safeguard databases and backups.
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster
              - rds:DeleteDBSnapshot
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  S3AccessPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 Access Policy for iOS App
    Value: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${S3AccessPolicy}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3AccessPolicyArn'
  DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB Protection Policy
    Value: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${DynamoDBProtectionPolicy}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn'
  RDSProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the RDS Protection Policy
    Value: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${RDSProtectionPolicy}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSProtectionPolicyArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an IAM role assumable exclusively by the Bedrock service (bedrock.amazonaws.com) within the same AWS account, scoped to Bedrock agent resources (agent/*). Grants permissions to invoke any Bedrock foundation model and trigger Lambda functions for custom logic integration.'

Resources:
  BedrockAgentServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: BedrockAgentServiceRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "aws:SourceAccount": !Ref AWS::AccountId
              StringLike:
                "aws:SourceArn": !Sub "arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/*"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockInvokePermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: bedrock:InvokeModel
                Resource: "arn:aws:bedrock:*:*:foundation-models/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: "*"

Outputs:
  BedrockAgentServiceRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Bedrock Agent Service Role
    Value: !GetAtt BedrockAgentServiceRole.Arn

          ResourceTypeFilters: !Ref ResourceTypes

Description: "Secure, cost-optimized S3 bucket for CloudWatch export data with configurable versioning and lifecycle management."

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: "cw-exports"
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name.
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Description: Whether to enable versioning on the bucket.
  DaysToIA:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: Number of days after which to transition to STANDARD_IA.
  DaysToGlacier:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    Description: Number of days after which to transition to GLACIER.
  DaysToExpire:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365
    Description: Number of days after which to expire current versions.
  NoncurrentVersionExpirationDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    Description: Number of days after which to expire noncurrent versions.

Conditions:
  VersioningEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableVersioning, "true"]

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for CloudWatch Exports S3 bucket encryption"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "Enable IAM User Permissions"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "Allow use of the key for S3"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "s3.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "CloudWatch Exports"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  S3EncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub "alias/${AWS::StackName}-s3-key"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref S3EncryptionKey

  CloudWatchExportsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !If
          - VersioningEnabled
          - Enabled
          - Suspended
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: "CloudWatchExportLifecycle"
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref DaysToIA
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref DaysToGlacier
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref DaysToExpire
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: !Ref NoncurrentVersionExpirationDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "CloudWatch Exports"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  CloudWatchExportsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CloudWatchExportsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "AllowCloudWatchLogsExports"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "logs.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource:
              - !Sub
                - '${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${BucketName}'
                - BucketName: !Ref CloudWatchExportsBucket
              - !Sub
                - '${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${BucketName}/*'
                - BucketName: !Ref CloudWatchExportsBucket
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "aws:SourceAccount": !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
              ArnLike:
                "aws:SourceArn": !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:*"
          - Sid: "ForceSSL"
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !Sub
                - '${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${BucketName}'
                - BucketName: !Ref CloudWatchExportsBucket
              - !Sub
                - '${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${BucketName}/*'
                - BucketName: !Ref CloudWatchExportsBucket
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref CloudWatchExportsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt CloudWatchExportsBucket.Arn
  KmsKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for S3 encryption
    Value: !GetAtt S3EncryptionKey.Arn
  KmsKeyAliasArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Ref S3EncryptionKeyAlias

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |-
  CloudFormation template to create an AWS GuardDuty detector for continuous security monitoring focused on malicious activity targeting EC2 instances.

Resources:
  GuardDutyDetector:
    Type: 'AWS::GuardDuty::Detector'
    Properties:
      Enable: true
      FindingPublishingFrequency: FIFTEEN_MINUTES
      DataSources:
        S3Logs:
          Enable: true
        # Note: VPC Flow Logs (via FlowLogs) and DNS logs should be enabled separately for comprehensive EC2 network threat detection,
        # as they enhance GuardDuty findings for reconnaissance and other network-based threats.
        MalwareProtection:
          ScanEc2InstanceWithFindings:
            EbsVolumes: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EC2SecurityMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

Outputs:
  DetectorId:
    Description: ID of the GuardDuty Detector for EC2 monitoring
    Value: !Ref GuardDutyDetector

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Public S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts with KMS encryption'

Parameters:
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Default: 'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/LambdaArtifactsServiceRole'

Resources:
  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: KMS key for S3 Lambda artifact encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root account admin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
          - Sid: Allow service role use
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow service role create grant
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
            Action: kms:CreateGrant
            Resource: '*'

  KeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/lambda-artifacts-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

  LambdaArtifactsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-lambda-artifacts-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Lambda artifacts

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: '*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${LambdaArtifactsBucket}'
              - !Sub '${LambdaArtifactsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: GetBucketPolicyStatus
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: s3:GetBucketPolicyStatus
            Resource: !Sub '${LambdaArtifactsBucket}'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
  KMSKeyId:
    Value: !Ref KMSKey
  AliasArn:
    Value: !Ref KeyAlias

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IAM role for AWS Service Catalog to enable secure provisioning and management of S3 and Lambda resources.'

Resources:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: servicecatalog.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaExecute
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ServiceCatalogOperationsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct
                  - servicecatalog:UpdateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:DescribeProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:SearchProducts
                  - servicecatalog:DescribeProduct
                  - servicecatalog:CreatePortfolioShare
                  - servicecatalog:DeletePortfolioShare
                  - servicecatalog:DescribePortfolio
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: IAMManagementPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:UpdateRole
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                  - iam:PutRolePolicy
                  - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                  - iam:PassRole
                  - iam:GetRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/*'
        - PolicyName: LambdaLifecyclePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:CreateFunction
                  - lambda:DeleteFunction
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionCode
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration
                  - lambda:AddPermission
                  - lambda:RemovePermission
                  - lambda:ListFunctions
                  - lambda:GetFunction
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:*'
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationOperationsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStack
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStack
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackResources
                  - cloudformation:ListStacks
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: SNSIntegrationPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:CreateTopic
                  - sns:DeleteTopic
                  - sns:Subscribe
                  - sns:Unsubscribe
                  - sns:Publish
                  - sns:GetTopicAttributes
                  - sns:SetTopicAttributes
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ServiceCatalogProvisioning
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for EC2 Image Builder support: IAM roles, instance profile, and S3 bucket for secure image build logs.'

Resources:
  ImageBuilderLogsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for Image Builder logs S3 bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

  LogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-imagebuilder-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

  ImageBuilderLogsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: ImageBuilderLogsPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}/*"
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}"
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: !GetAtt ImageBuilderLogsKey.Arn

  ImageBuilderInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ImageBuilderInstanceRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - !Ref ImageBuilderLogsPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ImageBuilderTaggingPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:CreateTags
                Resource: "*"

  ImageBuilderInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: ImageBuilderInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref ImageBuilderInstanceRole

Outputs:
  ImageBuilderRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ImageBuilderInstanceRole'
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceRole.Arn
  ImageBuilderInstanceProfileArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ImageBuilderInstanceProfile'
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceProfile.Arn
  LogsBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for Image Builder logs'
    Value: !Ref LogsBucket
  ImageBuilderLogsKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key for Image Builder logs encryption'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'VPC flow logs storage with AES256 encryption, lifecycle management, versioning control, and strict bucket policy for secure delivery from delivery.logs.amazonaws.com'

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional custom S3 bucket name. Leave empty to auto-generate a unique name.'
  VersioningEnabled:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Enabled'
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Description: 'Enable or suspend bucket versioning.'
  TransitionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    Description: 'Number of days after which to transition objects to Glacier.'
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1
    Description: 'Number of days after which to expire/delete objects.'

Conditions:
  CustomBucketNameProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref BucketName, '']]
  EnableVersioning: !Equals [!Ref VersioningEnabled, 'Enabled']

Resources:
  VPCFlowLogsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
          - Sid: AllowDeliveryService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: VPC Flow Logs KMS Key
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCFlowLogsKMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-vpc-flow-logs-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref VPCFlowLogsKMSKey

  VPCFlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !If
        - CustomBucketNameProvided
        - !Ref BucketName
        - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc-flow-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref VPCFlowLogsKMSKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !If [EnableVersioning, Enabled, Suspended]
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: FlowLogsLifecycleRule
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref RetentionDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: VPC Flow Logs Bucket
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCFlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowDeliveryService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                s3:x-amz-acl: bucket-owner-full-control
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
          - Sid: DenyCrossAccountPuts
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject*
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
                aws:PrincipalService: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketPolicyId:
    Description: ID of the bucket policy
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucketPolicy
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of KMS key for bucket encryption
    Value: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsKMSKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Self-configuring EC2 instance with Nginx via SSM Association and centralized S3 logging'

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: 'EC2 instance type'
    AllowedValues:
      - t2.micro
      - t3.micro
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: ''
    Description: 'EC2 KeyPair for SSH access (leave empty for no key)'
  SSHAccessCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: '0.0.0.0/0'
    Description: 'CIDR IP range for SSH access (port 22)'
    MinLength: '7'
    MaxLength: '18'
    AllowedPattern: '^(?=.*[0-9]).*(\/[0-9]{1,2})?$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be a valid CIDR range (e.g., 203.0.113.0/24 or 0.0.0.0/0)'

Conditions:
  UseKeyPair: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'VPC-${AWS::StackName}'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'IGW-${AWS::StackName}'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'PublicSubnet-${AWS::StackName}'

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'PublicRouteTable-${AWS::StackName}'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for Nginx web server with SSM access'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHAccessCIDR
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'SG-${AWS::StackName}'

  S3LogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketName: !Join ['', [!Ref 'AWS::StackName', '-ssm-logs-', !Ref 'AWS::Region', '-', !Ref 'AWS::AccountId']]

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3LogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject*
              - s3:GetObject*
              - s3:DeleteObject*
            Resource: !Join ['', ['arn:aws:s3:::', !Ref S3LogBucket, '/logs/*']]
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Join ['', ['arn:aws:ssm:', !Ref 'AWS::Region', ':', !Ref 'AWS::AccountId', ':association/*']]

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EC2SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3LogAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !GetAtt S3LogBucket.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Join ['', [!GetAtt S3LogBucket.Arn, '/logs/*']]

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      KeyName:
        Fn::If:
          - UseKeyPair
          - !Ref KeyName
          - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'NginxWebServer-${AWS::StackName}'

  NginxInstallAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      AssociationName: NginxInstallAssociation
      Name: AWS-RunShellScript
      Targets:
        - Key: InstanceIds
          Values:
            - !Ref EC2Instance
      Parameters:
        commands:
          - yum update -y
          - amazon-linux-extras install nginx1 -y
          - systemctl start nginx
          - systemctl enable nginx
      OutputLocation:
        S3Location:
          OutputS3BucketName: !Ref S3LogBucket
          OutputS3KeyPrefix: logs/

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID of the Nginx Web Server'
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  S3LogBucketName:
    Description: 'S3 Bucket Name for centralized SSM logging'
    Value: !Ref S3LogBucket
  SSMAssociationId:
    Description: 'SSM Association ID for Nginx installation'
    Value: !Ref NginxInstallAssociation
  PublicIP:
    Description: 'Public IP address of the Nginx Web Server'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Auto-configuring Nginx EC2 instance with tag-driven SSM installation, S3 centralized logging, and CloudWatch monitoring'

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
    Description: EC2 instance type
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional EC2 Key Pair for SSH access

Conditions:
  HasKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  WebServerSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx web server
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - Fn::If:
            - HasKeyName
            - IpProtocol: tcp
              FromPort: 22
              ToPort: 22
              CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
            - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: udp
          FromPort: 123
          ToPort: 123
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServerSG'

  LogKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for Nginx logs encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'

  LogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LogKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-logs'

  LogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${LogsBucket}'
              - !Sub '${LogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3LogsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:ReEncrypt*
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}/*'
                  - !GetAtt LogKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMRole'

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  NginxInstallDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Command
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxInstallDocument'
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: Install and configure Nginx with log shipping to S3
        parameters:
          BucketName:
            type: String
            description: S3 bucket name for Nginx logs
        mainSteps:
          - action: aws:runShellScript
            name: installNginx
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - yum update -y
                - yum install -y awscli
                - amazon-linux-extras install nginx1 -y
                - systemctl enable nginx
                - systemctl start nginx
                - mkdir -p /var/log/nginx
                - |
                  echo "0 * * * * root aws s3 sync /var/log/nginx/ s3://{{ BucketName }}/logs/nginx/ --delete --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1" | crontab -
                - systemctl restart crond
                - echo "Nginx installed and cron job for log sync configured"

  NginxAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref NginxInstallDocument
      Targets:
        - Key: tag:ConfigureNginx
          Values:
            - true
      Parameters:
        BucketName:
          - !Ref LogsBucket
      MaxConcurrency: '10%'
      MaxErrors: '5%'

  NginxEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M
        Count: 1
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [HasKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: '0'
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref WebServerSG
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          exec > >(tee /var/log/user-data.log|logger -t user-data -s 200) 2>&1
          yum install -y aws-cfn-bootstrap
          systemctl restart amazon-ssm-agent
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource NginxEC2Instance --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxInstance
        - Key: ConfigureNginx
          Value: true

  HighCPUAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HighCPU'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when CPU > 80% for 2 periods
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      MetricName: CPUUtilization
      Dimensions:
        - Name: InstanceId
          Value: !Ref NginxEC2Instance
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 80
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  HighNetworkOutAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HighNetworkOut'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when NetworkOut > 1MB/s average over 5 min
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      MetricName: NetworkOut
      Dimensions:
        - Name: InstanceId
          Value: !Ref NginxEC2Instance
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1000000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Unit: Bytes/Second

  StatusCheckFailedAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StatusCheckFailed'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when status check fails
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      MetricName: StatusCheckFailed
      Dimensions:
        - Name: InstanceId
          Value: !Ref NginxEC2Instance
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref NginxEC2Instance
  LogsBucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket for Nginx logs
    Value: !Ref LogsBucket
  AssociationId:
    Description: SSM Association ID for Nginx configuration
    Value: !Ref NginxAssociation
  PublicDnsName:
    Description: Public DNS name of the Nginx instance
    Value: !GetAtt NginxEC2Instance.PublicDnsName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Metadata:
  Description: >-
    Deploys a VPC with public subnet, EC2 instance running Amazon Linux 2 with IAM role for SSM,
    Security Group for web access, and a custom SSM Automation document for tag-driven OS updates,
    Nginx installation, and validation on instances tagged 'nginx: Yes'.
  AWS::CloudFormation::Interface:
    ParameterGroups: []
    ParameterLabels: {}

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx EC2 instance allowing SSH, HTTP, HTTPS
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  NginxEC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: NginxEC2SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EC2RebootPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:RebootInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
                Resource: '*'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref NginxEC2SSMRole

  NginxDemoInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId:
        Fn::Transform:
          - Name: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
            Parameters:
              ParameterName: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref SecurityGroup
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxDemoInstance
        - Key: nginx
          Value: "Yes"
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM

  NginxSetupAutomation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      Name: NginxSetupAutomation
      DocumentType: Automation
      Content: |
        schemaVersion: '0.3'
        description: Automates OS updates with reboot checks, Nginx installation, and validation on targeted EC2 instances
        assumeRole: "{{ AutomationAssumeRole }}"
        parameters:
          AutomationAssumeRole:
            type: String
            description: The ARN of the role that allows Automation to perform the actions on your behalf
            default: ""
          InstanceId:
            type: StringList
            description: EC2 Instance IDs; query via tags with AWS CLI
        mainSteps:
        - name: updateOS
          action: aws:runCommand
          inputs:
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Targets:
              - Key: InstanceIds
                Values: "{{ InstanceId }}"
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - sudo yum update -y
              - sudo yum autoremove -y
        - name: checkReboot
          action: aws:runCommand
          inputs:
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Targets:
              - Key: InstanceIds
                Values: "{{ InstanceId }}"
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - sh -

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Production-ready VPC infrastructure with one public subnet, two private subnets across three AZs, NAT Gateway, internal ALB, security groups, private ECR repository with scan-on-push, and SSM parameters for containerized application.'

Parameters:
  VPCCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for VPC
  PublicSubnetCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet
  PrivateSubnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.101.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet 1
  PrivateSubnet2CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.102.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet 2
  AllowedManagementCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for SSH management access (VPC CIDR for internal access)

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnetCIDR
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-${AWS::Region}a'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1CIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-${AWS::Region}b'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2CIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-${AWS::Region}c'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-eip'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  ACMCertificate:
    Type: AWS::CertificateManager::Certificate
    Properties:
      DomainName: internal.example.com
      ValidationMethod: EMAIL
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cert'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ALB
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VPCCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  BackendSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for backend/app services
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedManagementCidrBlock
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VPCCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-backend-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  DatabaseSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for database
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref BackendSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VPCCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Scheme: internal
      Type: application
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: 'true'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ALB
      Port: 443
      Protocol: HTTPS
      Certificates:
        - CertificateArn: !Ref ACMCertificate
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: fixed-response
          FixedResponseConfig:
            StatusCode: '404'
            ContentType: 'text/plain'
            MessageBody: 'Service not found'

  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-app'
      ImageTagMutability: IMMUTABLE
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-app'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  VPCSsmParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /network/vpc-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnetSsmParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /network/public-subnet-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet

  PrivateSubnet1SsmParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /network/private-subnet-1-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2SsmParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /network/private-subnet-2-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2

  ALBSGSsmParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /network/alb-sg-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup

  BackendSGSsmParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /network/backend-sg-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref BackendSecurityGroup

  DBSGSsmParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /network/db-sg-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref DatabaseSecurityGroup

  ListenerSsmParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /network/alb-listener-arn
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref Listener

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  ALBDnsName:
    Description: ALB DNS Name (Endpoint)
    Value: !GetAtt ALB.DNSName
  ECRRepositoryUri:
    Description: ECR Repository URI
    Value: !GetAtt ECRRepository.RepositoryUri
  ALBArn:
    Description: ALB ARN
    Value: !Ref ALB
  ListenerArn:
    Description: ALB Listener ARN
    Value: !Ref Listener
  VpcSsmParam:
    Description: SSM Parameter for VPC ID
    Value: /network/vpc-id
  ALBSsmParam:
    Description: SSM Parameter for ALB SG ID
    Value: /network/alb-sg-id

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless pipeline to collect, store, and analyze AWS Organization data for centralized governance and reporting.

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-orgdata-${AWS::Region}'
    MinLength: 3
    MaxLength: 63
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid S3 bucket name.
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '123456789012'
    MinLength: 12
    MaxLength: 12
    AllowedPattern: '^[0-9]{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a 12-digit AWS account ID.
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: managementcur
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{1,255}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Valid Glue database name.
  OrgRoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: OrgDataCollectionRole
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 64
    ConstraintDescription: IAM role name in management account.
  TagsToInclude:
    Type: String
    Default: ''

Resources:
  OrgDataKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: KMS key for OrgDataBucket SSE-KMS
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  OrgDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref OrgDataKMSKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaExecutionRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:*'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataLambdaPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - organizations:ListAccounts
                  - organizations:ListOrganizationalUnitsForParent
                  - organizations:ListParents
                  - organizations:ListRoots
                  - organizations:DescribeOrganizationalUnit
                  - organizations:ListTagsForResource
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ManagementAccountId}:role/${OrgRoleName}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataKMSKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  OrgDataLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataLambda'
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 900
      MemorySize: 512
      RuntimeManagementConfig:
        UpdateRuntimeOn: Manual
      Environment:
        Variables:
          S3Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
          ManagementAccountId: !Ref ManagementAccountId
          OrgRoleName: !Ref OrgRoleName
          TagsToInclude: !Ref TagsToInclude
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          from datetime import datetime
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              s3_bucket = os.environ['S3Bucket']
              mgmt_acct = os.environ['ManagementAccountId']
              org_role_name = os.environ['OrgRoleName']
              tags_to_include_str = os.environ.get('TagsToInclude', '')
              tags_to_include = [t.strip() for t in tags_to_include_str.split(',') if t.strip()]

              sts = boto3.client('sts')
              role_arn = f"arn:aws:iam::{mgmt_acct}:role/{org_role_name}"
              assumed_role = sts.assume_role(
                  RoleArn=role_arn,
                  RoleSessionName='OrgDataCollectionSession'
              )
              creds = assumed_role['Credentials']

              org_client = boto3.client(
                  'organizations',
                  aws_access_key_id=creds['AccessKeyId'],
                  aws_secret_access_key=creds['SecretAccessKey'],
                  aws_session_token=creds['SessionToken']
              )

              data = {
                  'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
                  'accounts': [],
                  'hierarchy': {}
              }

              # Accounts with filtered tags
              paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_accounts')
              for page in paginator.paginate():
                  for account in page.get('Accounts', []):
                      account_info = {k: v for k, v in account.items()}
                      account_tags = {}
                      try:
                          tags_response = org_client.list_tags_for_resource(
                              ResourceId=account['Id'],
                              ResourceType='ACCOUNT'
                          )
                          for tag in tags_response.get('Tags', []):
                              if not tags_to_include or tag['Key'] in tags_to_include:
                                  account_tags[tag['Key']] = tag['Value']
                          account_info['tags'] = account_tags
                      except Exception:
                          account_info['tags'] = {}
                      data['accounts'].append(account_info)

              # Organizational hierarchy with OUs and filtered tags
              def get_ous(parent_id, level=0):
                  ous = []
                  try:
                      response = org_client.list_organizational_units_for_parent(ParentId=parent_id)
                      for ou in response.get('OrganizationalUnits', []):
                          ou_info = ou.copy()
                          ou_info['level'] = level
                          ou_info['children'] = get_ous(ou['Id'], level + 1)
                          ou_tags = {}
                          try:
                              tags_resp = org_client.list_tags_for_resource(
                                  ResourceId=ou['Id'],
                                  ResourceType='ORGANIZATIONAL_UNIT'
                              )
                              for tag in tags_resp.get('Tags', []):
                                  if not tags_to_include or tag['Key'] in tags_to_include:
                                      ou_tags[tag['Key']] = tag['Value']
                              ou_info['tags'] = ou_tags
                          except Exception:
                              ou_info['tags'] = {}
                          ous.append(ou_info)
                  except Exception:
                      pass
                  return ous

              try:
                  roots_resp = org_client.list_roots()
                  if roots_resp['Roots']:
                      root_id = roots_resp['Roots'][0]['Id']
                      data['hierarchy'] = {
                          'root_id': root_id,
                          'children': get_ous(root_id)
                      }
              except Exception:
                  pass

              # Write to S3
              date_path = datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y/%m/%d')
              key = f"org-data/{date_path}/org-data.json"
              s3_client = boto3.client('s3')
              s3_client.put_object(
                  Bucket=s3_bucket,
                  Key=key,
                  Body=json.dumps(data, indent=2),
                  ContentType='application/json'
              )

              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps('Organization data collected successfully')}
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  OrgDataSchedule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      ScheduleExpression: cron(0 2 ? * SUN *)
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !GetAtt OrgDataLambda.Arn
          Id: OrgDataLambdaTarget
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  OrgDataLambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref OrgDataLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: events.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt OrgDataSchedule.Arn

  GlueServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueServiceRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataGluePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataKMSKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - glue:CreateDatabase
                  - glue:GetDatabase
                  - glue:UpdateDatabase
                  - glue:CreateTable
                  - glue:GetTable
                  - glue:UpdateTable
                  - glue:DeleteTable
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:catalog/database/${AthenaDatabaseName}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - glue:CreatePartition
                  - glue:DeletePartition
                  - glue:GetPartitions
                  - glue:BatchCreatePartition
                  - glue:BatchDeletePartition
                  - glue:GetPartition
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  OrgDataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: DenyUnauthorizedPrincipals
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotLike:
                'aws:PrincipalArn':
                  - !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
                  - !GetAtt GlueServiceRole.Arn

  OrgDataDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
        Description: Catalog for AWS Organizations data (accounts, OUs, tags)

  OrgDataCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataCrawler'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueServiceRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
      Description: Crawls S3 organization data into Glue catalog for Athena querying
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Sub 's3://${OrgDataBucket}/org-data/'
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: LOG
        DeleteBehavior: LOG
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: CRAWL_EVERYTHING
      Schedule:
        ScheduleExpression: cron(0 3 * * ? *)
      Configuration: '{"Version":1.0,"CrawlerOutput":{"Partitions":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"InheritFromTable"},"Tables":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"MergeNewColumns"}}}'
      Tags:
        Project: OrgDataPipeline
        Stack: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

Outputs:
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket for organization data
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataBucket'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function collecting org data
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataLambda.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataLambda'
  GlueCrawlerName:
    Description: Name of the Glue Crawler
    Value: !Ref OrgDataCrawler
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataCrawler'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Description: Name of the Athena/Glue database
    Value: !Ref OrgDataDatabase
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataDB'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys AWS Amplify app and production branch for TodoApp hosting

Parameters:
  RepositoryUrl:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: GitHub repo URL for TodoApp source code (connect repo manually in Amplify Console after deployment)
  AccessToken:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: ''
    Description: Personal Access Token (with repo access) for private repository
  BranchName:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    Description: Name of the production branch
  Framework:
    Type: String
    Default: React
    Description: Frontend framework for build configuration

Resources:
  TodoAppApp:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::App
    Properties:
      Name: TodoApp
      Description: !Sub "Production hosting for TodoApp web application from ${RepositoryUrl}"
      OauthToken: !Ref AccessToken
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: TodoApp
        - Key: RepositoryUrl
          Value: !Ref RepositoryUrl

  ProductionBranch:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::Branch
    Properties:
      AppId: !Ref TodoAppApp
      BranchName: !Ref BranchName
      EnableAutoBuild: true
      Framework: !Ref Framework
      EnvironmentVariables:
        - Name: NODE_ENV
          Value: production
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: TodoApp

Outputs:
  AmplifyAppId:
    Description: ID of the Amplify App
    Value: !Ref TodoAppApp
  DefaultDomainUrl:
    Description: Default domain URL of the Amplify App (serves production branch)
    Value: !GetAtt TodoAppApp.DefaultDomain
  BranchArn:
    Description: ARN of the Production Branch
    Value: !Ref ProductionBranch
  BranchUrl:
    Description: URL of the Production Branch
    Value: !Sub "https://${BranchName}.${TodoAppApp.DefaultDomain}"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure Multi-AZ VPC with NAT Gateways'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  GatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select ['0', !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select ['1', !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select ['0', !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
