AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated Image Recognition Pipeline with Step Functions, S3, Rekognition, and SNS SMS Alerts

Resources:
  ImageBucketKmsKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow Step Functions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${AWS::StackName}-StepFunctionsRole'
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow Cleanup Lambda
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${AWS::StackName}-CleanupLambdaRole'
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-images-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ImageBucketKmsKey

  StepFunctionsRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StepFunctionsRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'sts:ExternalId': !Ref AWS::StackName
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StepFunctionsLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Join
                  - ''
                  - 
                    - 'arn:aws:logs:'
                    - !Ref 'AWS::Region'
                    - ':'
                    - !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
                    - ':log-group:/aws/states/*'
        - PolicyName: StepFunctionsRekognitionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: rekognition:DetectLabels
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: StepFunctionsS3Policy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Join
                  - ''
                  - 
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::'
                    - !Ref Bucket
                    - '/*'
        - PolicyName: StepFunctionsSNSPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: StepFunctionsKmsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                Resource: !GetAtt ImageBucketKmsKey.Arn

  ImageRecognitionSM:
    Type: 'AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine'
    Properties:
      RoleArn: !GetAtt StepFunctionsRole.Arn
      DefinitionString: |
        {
          "Comment": "Image Recognition Pipeline",
          "StartAt": "DetectLabels",
          "States": {
            "DetectLabels": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::aws-sdk:rekognition:detectLabels",
              "Parameters": {
                "Image": {
                  "S3Object": {
                    "Bucket.$": "$.bucket",
                    "Name.$": "$.key"
                  }
                },
                "MaxLabels": 10,
                "MinConfidence": 80
              },
              "ResultPath": "$.rekognition",
              "Next": "FormatPersonCheck"
            },
            "FormatPersonCheck": {
              "Type": "Pass",
              "Parameters": {
                "personCount.$": "States.ArrayLength($.rekognition.Labels[?(@.Name == `Person` || @.Name == `Human`)])",
                "bucket.$": "$.bucket",
                "key.$": "$.key"
              },
              "Next": "CheckForPerson"
            },
            "CheckForPerson": {
              "Type": "Choice",
              "Choices": [
                {
                  "Variable": "$.personCount",
                  "NumericGreaterThan": 0,
                  "Next": "SendSMS"
                }
              ],
              "Default": "Success"
            },
            "SendSMS": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::aws-sdk:sns:publish",
              "Parameters": {
                "PhoneNumber": "+14071113333",
                "Message.$": "States.Format('Human/Person detected in {} ({})', $.key, $.bucket)"
              },
              "End": true
            },
            "Success": {
              "Type": "Succeed"
            }
          }
        }
      LoggingConfiguration:
        Level: ALL
        IncludeExecutionData: true
        Destinations:
          - CloudWatchLogsLogGroup: {}

  EventBridgeRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EventBridgeStepFunctionsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - states:StartExecution
                Resource: !Ref ImageRecognitionSM

  ImageUploadRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      Description: Trigger Step Functions on image upload to S3
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - Object Created
        detail:
          bucket:
            name:
              - equals:
                  - !Ref Bucket
          object:
            key:
              - suffix:
                  - .jpg
                  - .jpeg
                  - .png
                  - .gif
                  - .bmp
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: StepFunctionsTarget
          Arn: !Ref ImageRecognitionSM
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRole.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              'bucket': '$.detail.bucket.name'
              'key': '$.detail.object.key'
            InputTemplate: '{"bucket":"<bucket>","key":"<key>"}'

  CleanupLambdaRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CleanupLambdaRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CleanupS3Policy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Join
                  - ''
                  - 
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::'
                    - !Ref Bucket
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                  - s3:DeleteObjectVersion
                Resource: !Join
                  - ''
                  - 
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::'
                    - !Ref Bucket
                    - '/*'
        - PolicyName: CleanupKmsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                Resource: !GetAtt ImageBucketKmsKey.Arn

  CleanupLambda:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Timeout: 900
      Role: !GetAtt CleanupLambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.request
          import boto3
          import traceback

          def send_response(event, context, response_status, response_data=None, physical_resource_id=None):
              response_url = event['ResponseURL']
              response_data = response_data or {}
              response_body = {
                  'Status': response_status,
                  'Reason': 'See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream. Press View in CloudFormation console.',
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id or event['PhysicalResourceId'],
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': response_data
              }
              json_response_body = json.dumps(response_body)

              print('ResponseURL: %s' % response_url)
              print('ResponseBody: %s' % json_response_body)

              headers = {
                  'content-type': '',
                  'content-length': str(len(json_response_body))
              }

              try:
                  req = urllib.request.Request(response_url, data=json_response_body.encode('utf-8'), method='PUT', headers=headers)
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
                      print(response.read())
                  print('send_response data sent successfully')
              except Exception as e:
                  print('send_response failed: ' + str(e))

          def handler(event, context):
              print('Request received: %s' % json.dumps(event))
              try:
                  request_type = event['RequestType']
                  bucket = event['ResourceProperties']['BucketName']
                  physical_resource_id = bucket

                  if request_type == 'Delete':
                      s3 = boto3.client('s3')
                      # Handle delete markers and versions
                      is_truncated = True
                      while is_truncated:
                          versions_response = s3.list_object_versions(Bucket=bucket)
                          delete_markers = versions_response.get('DeleteMarkers', [])
                          if delete_markers:
                              deletes = [{'Key': dm['Key'], 'VersionId': dm['VersionId']} for dm in delete_markers[:1000]]
                              if deletes:
                                  s3.delete_objects(Bucket=bucket, Delete={'Objects': deletes})
                          versions = versions_response.get('Versions', [])
                          if versions:
                              deletes = [{'Key': v['Key'], 'VersionId': v['VersionId']} for v in versions[:1000]]
                              if deletes:
                                  s3.delete_objects(Bucket=bucket, Delete={'Objects': deletes})
                          is_truncated = versions_response.get('IsTruncated', False)
                      send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS')
                  else:
                      send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', None, physical_resource_id)
                  return {'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id}
              except Exception as e:
                  print('Exception: %s' % traceback.format_exc())
                  send_response(event, context, 'FAILED', {'Error': str(e)})
                  raise e

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Permission'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref CleanupLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: cfn.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub '${AWS::StackId}'

  EmptyBucketResource:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource'
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt CleanupLambda.Arn
      BucketName: !Ref Bucket

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Upload images here to trigger pipeline
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  StateMachineArn:
    Description: ARN for monitoring executions
    Value: !Ref ImageRecognitionSM
  RuleArn:
    Value: !Ref ImageUploadRule
  PhoneNumber:
    Description: Phone number for SMS alerts
    Value: '+14071113333'
  KeyArn:
    Description: KMS Key ARN for bucket encryption
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBucketKmsKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a VPC with public subnets, Security Groups, IAM roles for SSM, Launch Templates, and Auto Scaling Groups for Linux and Windows EC2 instances managed by AWS Systems Manager (SSM).

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: EC2 instance type for the launch templates.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InternetGateway"

  GatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1"

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  Subnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances allowing HTTP inbound and HTTPS outbound for SSM.
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSecurityGroup"

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SSMRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SSMInlinePolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetDocument
                  - ssm:DescribeDocument
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                  - ssm:GetParameters
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:PutInventory
                  - ssm:PutComplianceItems
                  - ssm:PutConfigurePackageResult
                  - ssm:UpdateAssociationStatus
                  - ssm:UpdateInstanceAssociationStatus
                  - ssm:UpdateInstanceInformation
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2messages:AcknowledgeMessage
                  - ec2messages:DeleteMessage
                  - ec2messages:FailMessage
                  - ec2messages:GetEndpoint
                  - ec2messages:GetMessages
                  - ec2messages:SendReply
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SSMRole"

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SSMInstanceProfile"
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  LinuxLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LinuxLaunchTemplate"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: 'resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1'
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt SSMInstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum update -y
            yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent aws-cfn-bootstrap
            systemctl daemon-reload
            systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
            /opt/amazon/ssm/bin/amazon-ssm-agent -update
            sleep 60
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LinuxLaunchTemplate"

  WindowsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-WindowsLaunchTemplate"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: 'resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base:1'
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt SSMInstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            <powershell>
            Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Force
            Restart-Service AmazonSSMAgent -Force
            & "C:\Program Files\Amazon\SSM\amazon-ssm-agent.exe" -Update
            Start-Sleep 60
            </powershell>
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-WindowsLaunchTemplate"

  LinuxAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LinuxASG"
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LinuxLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LinuxLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      NewInstancesProtectedFromScaleIn: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LinuxASG"
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  WindowsAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-WindowsASG"
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WindowsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WindowsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      NewInstancesProtectedFromScaleIn: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-WindowsASG"
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  LinuxAutoScalingGroup:
    Description: Name of the Linux Auto Scaling Group for SSM managed instances
    Value: !Ref LinuxAutoScalingGroup
  WindowsAutoScalingGroup:
    Description: Name of the Windows Auto Scaling Group for SSM managed instances
    Value: !Ref WindowsAutoScalingGroup
  LinuxLaunchTemplateId:
    Description: ID of the Linux Launch Template
    Value: !Ref LinuxLaunchTemplate
  WindowsLaunchTemplateId:
    Description: ID of the Windows Launch Template
    Value: !Ref WindowsLaunchTemplate
  InstanceSecurityGroupId:
    Description: ID of the Instance Security Group
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-tier AWS network environment with secure public/private subnets, NAT Gateway, and SSM-managed EC2 instances (public web server, private backend).'

Mappings:
  AmazonLinux2AMI:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a313d6098716f372
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0a60d097a8d2a6f5b
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0b4c8e6e5f6d7e8f9

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA'

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB'

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA'

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetB'

  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatEIP'

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRT'

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
    DependsOn: NatGateway

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
    DependsOn: NatGateway

  PublicSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Public Security Group - HTTP access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSG'

  PrivateSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Private Security Group - HTTPS from Public SG only
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref PublicSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSG'

  SSMInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMInstanceRole'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMInstanceRole

  PublicLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [AmazonLinux2AMI, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
          HttpProtocolIpv6: disabled
          InstanceMetadataTags: enabled
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: '0'
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
            Groups:
              - !Ref PublicSecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      DependsOn: InstanceProfile
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicLaunchTemplate'

  PrivateLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [AmazonLinux2AMI, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
          HttpProtocolIpv6: disabled
          InstanceMetadataTags: enabled
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: '0'
            SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
            Groups:
              - !Ref PrivateSecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: false
      DependsOn: InstanceProfile
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateLaunchTemplate'

  PublicInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateSpecification:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref PublicLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt PublicLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y httpd php
          systemctl enable httpd
          systemctl start httpd
          cat << 'EOF' > /var/www/html/index.php
          <?php phpinfo(); ?>
          EOF
          systemctl restart httpd
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource PublicInstance --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure static website hosted on S3 with CloudFront CDN integration using OAC, custom cache policy, HTTPS enforcement, and Lambda custom resource for automated content management and cleanup.'

Resources:
  StaticSiteKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for static site S3 encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 SSE-KMS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-static-site-${AWS::StackName}/*'
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
          - Sid: Allow CloudFront Decrypt
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudfront.amazonaws.com
            Action: kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-static-site-${AWS::StackName}/*'

  StaticSiteKMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-static-site-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref StaticSiteKMSKey

  StaticSiteBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-static-site-${AWS::StackName}"
      ObjectLockEnabled: false
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref StaticSiteKMSKey

  StaticSiteBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref StaticSiteBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudFrontServicePrincipal
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudfront.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub "${StaticSiteBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                AWS:SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:cloudfront::${AWS::AccountId}:distribution/${StaticSiteDistribution}"

  StaticSiteOAC:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::OriginAccessControl
    Properties:
      OriginAccessControlConfig:
        Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-static-site-oac"
        Description: OAC for secure S3 static site integration
        SigningProtocol: sigv4
        OriginAccessControlOriginType: s3
        SigningBehavior: no-override

  StaticSiteWebACL:
    Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL
    Properties:
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      Scope: CLOUDFRONT
      VisibilityConfig:
        SampledRequestsEnabled: true
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
        MetricName: StaticSiteMetric

  StaticSiteDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    DependsOn: S3ContentManager
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Aliases: !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: S3StaticSiteOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          Compress: true
          MinTTL: 0
          DefaultTTL: 60
          MaxTTL: 3600
          ForwardedValues:
            Cookies:
              Forward: 'none'
            Headers: []
            QueryString: false
        DefaultRootObject: index.html
        Enabled: true
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true
          MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2021
        WebACLId: !Ref StaticSiteWebACL
        Origins:
          - Id: S3StaticSiteOrigin
            DomainName: !Sub "${StaticSiteBucket}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            OriginAccessControlId: !Ref StaticSiteOAC
            S3OriginConfig: {}

  ContentManagerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3ContentManagerPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:ListBucketVersions
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${StaticSiteBucket}"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${StaticSiteBucket}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:ReEncrypt*
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !GetAtt StaticSiteKMSKey.Arn

  ContentManagerLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Description: Lambda function to manage S3 bucket content for static site
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt ContentManagerRole.Arn
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Timeout: 300
      MemorySize: 128
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          const AWS = require('aws-sdk');
          const s3 = new AWS.S3({ apiVersion: '2006-03-01' });
          const response = require('cfn-response');

          const deleteBucketContents = async (bucket) => {
            let isTruncated;
            let keyMarker;
            let versionIdMarker;
            do {
              const params = {
                Bucket: bucket,
                MaxKeys: 1000
              };
              if (keyMarker) {
                params.KeyMarker = keyMarker;
              }
              if (versionIdMarker) {
                params.VersionIdMarker = versionIdMarker;
              }
              const data = await s3.listObjectVersions(params).promise();
              const objectsToDelete = [];
              if (data.Versions) {
                data.Versions.forEach((version) => {
                  objectsToDelete.push({
                    Key: version.Key,
                    VersionId: version.VersionId
                  });
                });
              }
              if (data.DeleteMarkers) {
                data.DeleteMarkers.forEach((marker) => {
                  objectsToDelete.push({
                    Key: marker.Key,
                    VersionId: marker.VersionId
                  });
                });
              }
              if (objectsToDelete.length > 0) {
                await s3.deleteObjects({
                  Bucket: bucket,
                  Delete: { Objects: objectsToDelete }
                }).promise();
              }
              isTruncated = data.IsTruncated;
              keyMarker = data.NextKeyMarker;
              versionIdMarker = data.NextVersionIdMarker;
            } while (isTruncated);
          };

          exports.handler = async (event, context) => {
            const bucket = event.ResourceProperties.BucketName;
            const responseData = {};
            let status = response.SUCCESS;
            try {
              if (event.RequestType === 'Create' || event.RequestType === 'Update') {
                const html = '<html><body>Static Site Powered by S3 + CloudFront</body></html>';
                await s3.putObject({
                  Bucket: bucket,
                  Key: 'index.html',
                  Body: html,
                  ContentType: 'text/html',
                  CacheControl: 'max-age=60'
                }).promise();
              } else if (event.RequestType === 'Delete') {
                await deleteBucketContents(bucket);
              }
            } catch (err) {
              console.error(err);
              status = response.FAILED;
              responseData.Error = err.message;
            }
            await response.send(event, context, status, responseData, bucket);
          };

  S3ContentManager:
    Type: Custom::S3ContentManager
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt ContentManagerLambdaFunction.Arn
      BucketName: !Ref StaticSiteBucket

Outputs:
  CloudFrontDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the CloudFront distribution
    Value: !GetAtt StaticSiteDistribution.DomainName
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket hosting the static site
    Value: !Ref StaticSiteBucket
  OriginAccessControlId:
    Description: ID of the CloudFront Origin Access Control
    Value: !Ref StaticSiteOAC

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Minimal Redis ElastiCache caching solution with EC2 access via SSM'

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
    Description: EC2 instance type

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0a36ebdb969e5ab3a
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0a6ed1fa711df9b1b

Conditions: {}

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: RedisCachingVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Public'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: RedisClient

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Private1'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ElastiCache

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Private2'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ElastiCache

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRT'

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  ElastiCacheSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ElastiCache Redis cluster
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ElastiCacheSG'

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 Redis client (outbound to ElastiCache only)
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SG'

  ElastiCacheIngressRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref ElastiCacheSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 6379
      ToPort: 6379
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup

  EC2EgressRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 6379
      ToPort: 6379
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref ElastiCacheSecurityGroup

  ElastiCacheSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::SubnetGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Subnet group for ElastiCache across two AZs
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2

  RedisReplicationGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::ReplicationGroup
    Properties:
      ReplicationGroupId: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-redis'
      ReplicationGroupDescription: Minimal single-node Redis cluster for caching
      Engine: redis
      EngineVersion: 7.1
      CacheNodeType: cache.t4g.micro
      NumCacheClusters: 1
      Port: 6379
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Ref ElastiCacheSubnetGroup
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref ElastiCacheSecurityGroup
      AtRestEncryptionEnabled: true
      TransitEncryptionEnabled: true
      AutomaticFailoverEnabled: false

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600

  EC2SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  RedisClientInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2SSMInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: '0'
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -ex
          yum update -y
          amazon-linux-extras install -y redis6
          ENDPOINT=${RedisReplicationGroup.PrimaryEndPoint.Address}
          until timeout 10 redis-cli -h $ENDPOINT --tls -p 6379 ping 2>/dev/null | grep -q PONG; do
            echo "Waiting for Redis to be ready..."
            sleep 10
          done
          echo "Redis connectivity test successful!"
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource RedisClientInstance --region ${AWS::Region}
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
        HttpTokens: 'required'
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M

Outputs:
  RedisPrimaryEndpoint:
    Description: Primary endpoint address of the Redis cluster
    Value: !GetAtt RedisReplicationGroup.PrimaryEndPoint.Address

  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref RedisClientInstance

  SSMStartSessionCommand:
    Description: Command to start SSM Session Manager to the EC2 instance
    Value: !Sub 'aws ssm start-session --target ${RedisClientInstance}'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for AWS Bedrock Agent integrated with Lambda function providing automated stock price lookup capabilities using a foundational AI model.'

Parameters:
  AgentName:
    Type: String
    Default: StockLookupAgent
    Description: Name of the Bedrock Agent
  FoundationModelId:
    Type: String
    Default: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
    Description: ID of the foundation model for the agent
  Price:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    Description: Hardcoded stock price returned by the Lambda function
  OpenApiSchema:
    Type: String
    Default: |
      openapi: 3.0.0
      info:
        title: Stock Price API
        version: 1.0.0
      paths:
        /getStockPrice:
          post:
            requestBody:
              required: true
              content:
                application/json:
                  schema:
                    type: object
                    required:
                      - symbol
                    properties:
                      symbol:
                        type: string
            responses:
              '200':
                description: Successful stock price retrieval
                content:
                  application/json:
                    schema:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        price:
                          type: number
                        symbol:
                          type: string

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: LambdaExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: BedrockStockAgent
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  StockPriceLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: StockPriceLambda
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os

          def handler(event, context):
            parameters = event.get('parameters', {})
            symbol = parameters.get('symbol', 'UNKNOWN')
            price = float(os.environ.get('PRICE', '100'))
            response_body = {
              "price": price,
              "symbol": symbol
            }
            return {
              "responseBody": {
                "application/json": json.dumps(response_body)
              }
            }
      Environment:
        Variables:
          PRICE: !Ref Price
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: BedrockStockAgent
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  BedrockAgentServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: BedrockAgentServiceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockAgentInlinePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - bedrock:InvokeModel
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: BedrockStockAgent
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  StockLookupAgent:
    Type: AWS::Bedrock::Agent
    Properties:
      AgentName: !Ref AgentName
      FoundationModel: !Ref FoundationModelId
      Instruction: 'You are a stock price assistant. Use the getStockPrice action for any stock-related queries by providing the stock symbol.'
      AgentResourceRoleArn: !GetAtt BedrockAgentServiceRole.Arn
      ActionGroups:
        - ActionGroupName: StockActions
          ActionGroupExecutor:
            Lambda: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn
          ApiSchema:
            Payload: !Ref OpenApiSchema
      Tags:
        Project: BedrockStockAgent
        StackName: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  AgentId:
    Description: ID of the Bedrock Agent
    Value: !Ref StockLookupAgent
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Stock Price Lambda Function
    Value: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda Execution Role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
  BedrockAgentServiceRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Bedrock Agent Service Role
    Value: !GetAtt BedrockAgentServiceRole.Arn
